news.Title: 台積電營收明開獎！2大名師看好第1季破1.1兆元 史上最強
news.Content:
台積電（2330）即將於明（10）日揭曉3月營收表現，兩大股市名師預估有機會超過4000億元，讓第一季營收合計超過新台幣1.1兆元，達到台積電董事長魏哲家之前在法說會的預期，並超越去年第四季的營收表現，寫下史上最強的一季。

根據台積電董事長魏哲家 今年1月法說會提出的財測，預估首季營收將介於 346 億至 358 億美元。若以當時匯率約在31.6元左右看換算，大約是新台幣1兆933億元至1兆1,312億元之間。

回顧前2個月表現，台積電1月營收4,012.55億元創下單月歷史新高，2月雖受工作天數變少等影響回落至 3,176.57億元，但累計前兩月營收已達7,189.12億元，這意味著3月營收只需達 3,744億元 即可跨越財測門檻，並有機會挑戰高標甚至寫下超預期表現。

股市名師蔡明翰：3900億元沒有懸念 4000億元有機會

面對即將揭曉的3月營收，資深台股分析師蔡明翰指出，依照前2個月的進度來看，台積電要達到法說會預期的「均標」幾乎沒有懸念。

蔡明翰分析，若要達到首季營測的均標，3月營收需落在3,900億至4,000億元之間，這在目前市場的合理預期內，但投資人更關注的是台積電能否「超越自我」，衝破法說會給出的高標水位。

「如果要挑戰高標，3月營收必須來到4,000億元以上。」蔡明翰進一步說明，目前市場法人的預估多聚焦在4,000億元上下，如果最終數據能站穩4,000 億大關，甚至來到高標，對於股價將具有明顯的「利多激勵」效果；反之，若僅落在 3,900 億元附近的均標水準，雖符合財測，但對股價的刺激力道恐將相對轉弱。

群益投顧董座估神山3月營收上看4124億元

群益投顧董事長蔡明彥則預期台積電3月營收有望上看4,124億元。並點出兩大支撐動能。第一，匯率助攻，台積電年初法說假設匯率為31.6元，但3月底新台幣兌美元匯率落在31.8元至 31.9元左右，在「美金計價、台幣呈現」的邏輯下，這筆匯差將成為營收衝過高標的強力推手。

第二，投片周期效應， 針對 3 奈米產能疑慮，他解釋半導體從投片到出貨需約4 個月。3 月份的營收早在去年Q4 AI 需求爆發、客戶搶著「提前拉貨」時就已定調，這股動能成了最強的業績護城河。

蔡明彥：需留意中國手機衰退風險 恐在第2季浮現

儘管首季看好，蔡明彥也提醒需留意中國手機市場雙位數衰退的隱憂。他認為，中低階機種賣不動的壓力，最快要到 第2季或第3季才會反映在台積電財報上。不過他也指出，即便手機端出現減單，台積電仍能藉由調度高階製程或其他AI客戶填補產能。目前看來，在AI高階製程持續滿載下，台積電首季財測不但能順利達標，甚至有望以優於高標的亮眼成績，為市場帶來驚喜。

陳依旻／財經特派記者副組長，主跑央行、證交所、投信投顧等

news.Title: 台達電市值衝破4.3兆！謝金河：另一座神山正在崛起
news.Content:
財經中心／楊佩怡報導

台達電（2308）公告 3 月營收表現強勁，以 597.80 億元一舉刷新單月歷史紀錄，較上月及去年同期分別大幅成長 19.81% 與 37.60%。對此，財信傳媒董事長謝金河指出，很多人都沒有注意到一直很低調的台達電正在快速崛起，「已經穩居台灣第二大巿值企業」。

謝金河認為台達電正在默默的崛起。（圖／翻攝自 Google Maps）

財信傳媒董事長謝金河在臉書發文表示，「低調的另一座神山正在崛起」，他指出很多人都說台灣是台積電一個人的武林，雖然台積電市值占台灣股市超過四成，撐大整個供應鏈，讓更多的小樹苗逐漸茁壯長大。不過最近一直低調的台達電正在快速崛起，謝金河說道這幾天，台達電股價漲到1705元，市值跑到4.3249兆元，「已經穩居台灣第二大巿值企業」。在2025年這時候，台達電股價才275元，短短的一年，這個變化不可說不大。

台達電今（9）日股價呈現開高走低態勢，盤中挑戰1705元高點後遇阻回落，最終回檔至1650元。（圖／翻攝自 Google財經）

謝金河指出，改變這一切的是AI帶來的神奇力量，「台達電從電源到散熱，在AI吃電的產業，台達電提供完整的解決方案，搖身一變成為世界級大企業」。去年台達電全年營收5548.85億元，淨利601.08億元，Eps23.14元，這是史上最好的成績，因此謝金河認為今年還會更上一層樓。而除了台灣的台達電，還有泰國的泰達電，今（9）日泰達電再創295泰銖高價，市值到3.68兆泰銖，把兩家公司加在一起，市值約台幣8兆元。

最後，謝金河大讚這個從電源供應器起家的企業征戰全球，不斷的追求成長，並且落實公司治理，永續發展，一直都是台灣得到最高評價的企業。「過去幾十年，台達電市值，規模都差鴻海很遠，市值相差一兆多，如今台達電市值比鴻海多1.5兆元，看起來也給劉揚偉帶來壓力。這些年，從鄭崇華，海英俊到鄭平，鄭安，他們一棒接一棒，跑出台灣的典範，令人尊敬！」。

原文出處：<a href="https://finance.ftvnews.com.t

news.Title: 《韓股》地緣政治消息面影響 KOSPI收跌1.61%
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-04-09 16:28:01 數位內容中心 發佈

韓股今(9)日收低，韓國KOSPI指數收於5778.01點，下跌94.33點或1.61%；韓國KOSDAQ指數收於1076.00點，下跌13.85點或1.27%。盤勢由外部地緣政治消息面主導，美國與伊朗宣布短期停戰後，市場對停戰可持續性的疑慮以及海外資金流動，使盤中震盪加劇，造成先前反彈後的獲利了結與風險偏好下降，進而拖累兩大指數收低。

停戰消息公布後，國際油價自100美元上方回檔，但隨即出現反覆，荷姆茲海峽傳出可能再度封鎖，以及區域軍事行動的不確定性，使避險情緒回升。同時，韓元對美元匯率見回升，並伴隨債券利率小幅上揚，匯債雙重壓力加劇市場調整情緒，成為今日賣壓的重要因素。

盤面上，大型權值股普遍走弱，Samsung Electronics(005930.KS)跌3.09%，SK Hynix(000660.KS)跌3.39%，Hyundai Motor(005380.KS)跌3.64%，KIA(000270.KS)跌5.46%；相較下，LG Energy Solution(373220.KS)為少數逆勢上漲個股、漲3.69%。產業面上，運輸裝備與電機電子類股領跌，而通信、化學、食品煙草、金屬與紡織服飾等類股相對抗跌，顯示市場在地緣政治壓力下出現明顯的類股分歧走勢。

此外，今日外資為盤面主導賣方，個人與機構則呈現淨買入。KOSPI今日上漲家數986、下跌家數1,272，KOSDAQ上漲家數528、下跌家數1,114，呈現多數個股下跌的交投格局，而外資站賣方對整體市場情緒與指數走勢具關鍵影響。

《日股》美伊停火2周/風險偏好回升 日經大漲5.39%

美民眾對通膨預期攀升，Fed暗示利率續居高位

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

news.Title: Palantir Just Did This for the First Time in a Year. Time to Buy?
news.Content:
Palantir Technologies (NASDAQ: PLTR) has been a winning stock for investors over the long term, as it's advanced more than 500% in five years. Investors piled into the software stock for its strengths in artificial intelligence (AI) -- the company offers customers an easy path to applying this hot technology to their needs.

This AI focus has helped Palantir generate explosive growth in recent quarters and increase profit, too. The company has spoken of high demand that shows no signs of faltering.

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

But in recent times, Palantir stock has seen its momentum shift into negative territory, losing about 16% since the start of the year. Investors have worried about the durability of AI spending, and that's prompted them to hesitate before buying AI stocks -- particularly ones that have roared higher during this AI boom. Investors have also been concerned about geopolitical and economic uncertainty, elements that generally weigh on growth companies.

Against this backdrop, Palantir stock recently did something for the first time in a year. Is it time to buy this beaten-down AI stock? Let's find out.

One of the market's top AI stocks

First, let's take a deeper look at how Palantir became one of the market's leading AI stocks . The company's business may not seem overly exciting: It makes software that helps customers analyze their data and use it in a variety of ways. But Palantir's platforms actually deliver game-changing results in many cases, helping customers become more efficient or even more innovative.

Palantir's Artificial Intelligence Platform (AIP) brings the power of large language models into the mix, and the introduction of this product in 2023 has supercharged growth as customers -- from government to commercial -- have rushed to get in on it. Amid the promise of AI, companies and government agencies are seeking to apply it to their operations, but in many cases, the task may be complicated.

Enter Palantir. AIP offers a fast, easy way to use AI and achieve major results. Palantir even holds bootcamps for potential customers so that they may discover use cases for the software before deciding whether to sign up. This has proven to be a wise manner of building up business as it's resulted in major contract wins and expansions.

Palantir's soaring revenue

Quarter after quarter, Palantir has offered investors evidence of its strength, delivering double-digit growth, reporting ongoing demand, and lifting forecasts. Customer count and contract value have also been on the rise. In the latest quarter, the number of customers climbed 34%, and the company closed more than $4 billion in contract value -- a record.

Story Continues

This trend over the past few years has supported stock performance. But along with the general headwinds impacting Palantir and other growth stocks, another element has perturbed this player. And that's valuation, which at one point reached a high of more than 240x forward earnings estimates, suggesting the stock was pretty expensive.

In recent weeks, though, Palantir has seen its valuation drop, at one point even falling below 100x forward earnings estimates -- something it hasn't done in about a year.

Valuation has rebounded from that level, but it remains significantly lower than it's generally been over the past 10 months amid the general uncertainties I mentioned above.

Should you buy Palantir stock?

Now let's return to our question: Is Palantir a stock to buy now that its valuation has come down? Palantir still isn't cheap, so value investors or cautious investors may find opportunities elsewhere that better suit their priorities. But current levels make this stock attractive for investors seeking growth.

It's important to keep in mind that Palantir has seen earnings march higher for a number of quarters, and demand from its commercial and government customers remains healthy. And many of these customers come to Palantir for long-term projects. For example, Palantir and GE Aerospace recently expanded their multi-year partnership, work that ensures aviation readiness for the U.S. Air Force.

All of this should fuel growth in the coming years, potentially boosting stock performance too -- this means that, even though Palantir isn't dirt cheap today, you still may secure impressive returns if you hold onto the stock for the long term.

news.Title: 《日股》日經收跌0.73%、半導體權值股承壓
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-04-09 16:14:48 數位內容中心 發佈

日股今(9)日回檔，半導體權值股承壓。日經225指數收於55895.32點，下跌413.10點或0.73%；東證股價指數(TOPIX)收於3741.47點，下跌33.83點或0.90%。市場在歷經前一日大漲後，出現明顯獲利了結賣壓。

儘管美國與伊朗達成短期停戰協議，短暫支撐了風險性資產，但市場對停戰持續性仍存疑，加上荷姆茲海峽通航量尚未恢復，WTI原油自高檔壓回後仍在高檔震盪，油價不確定性成為壓抑盤勢的外在變數。

盤面上，半導體與其他大型權值股普遍回檔，Advantest(6857.JP)為拖累日經225下跌最關鍵的個股，據報導其對指數下壓約125點。今日指標股走弱顯著抑制指數進一步反彈空間。

類股方面，保險、空運、證券與商品期貨業承壓，而非鐵金屬、海運、玻璃與土石製品表現相對堅挺。市場普遍認為，這屬於前一日急漲後的輪動與獲利了結，而半導體類股的回檔對整體市場影響最為明顯。

《日股》美伊停火2周/風險偏好回升 日經大漲5.39%

油價近一年漲逾3成，通膨疑慮促央行態度轉鷹

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

news.Title: The Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stock I'd Buy With $1,000 Before the Market Bounces Back
news.Content:
Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOGL) (NASDAQ: GOOG) , Google's parent company, was arguably the market's hottest artificial intelligence (AI) stock up until the Nasdaq Composite Index 's correction last month. The sell-off knocked the tech giant off a monster rally, where it surged by more than 100% over the past year.

Shares currently sit about 13% off their high. If you have $1,000 or some other amount to invest, here's why you may want to scoop up Alphabet stock before the tech-heavy market index rebounds.

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

Alphabet's hot momentum will likely continue

The company's fourth-quarter 2025 earnings report made one thing very clear: AI is driving strong performance throughout the company.

Revenue from Google Search and other ads, its legacy business that investors once feared would crumble due to AI, soared 17% year over year. AI overviews within Search have been a game changer. Google Cloud continued to accelerate on AI-driven demand, with revenue up by 48% and operating income up more than 153% in the quarter.

Although the fight between AI companies OpenAI and Anthropic seems to dominate the news headlines, Alphabet is right there in the mix, with its vast user base. The Google Gemini AI app now has more than 750 million monthly active users, and Google has more than 325 million paid subscribers across Google One and YouTube.

Don't forget about Waymo, Google's autonomous ride-hailing service, which continues to expand and has raised external funding to help accelerate that expansion.

In all, Alphabet has a ton of business momentum right now. Total revenue grew by 15% in 2025, and analysts expect growth to accelerate to almost 17% this year. It's impressive for a company now generating $403 billion in annual revenue. Oh yeah, Alphabet hasn't even begun powering Apple 's upcoming revamped Siri AI assistant with its Gemini AI yet.

Why investors should buy the dip, not fear it

Is Alphabet a bargain after this pullback? No. But its valuation seems very fair, at worst. Alphabet stock trades at 27 times its trailing 12-month earnings, and analysts expect earnings to grow by an average of 15% annually over the long term. That's a PEG ratio of 1.8. Again, not cheap, but it indicates a very reasonable P/E ratio for the growth you're expecting from one of the best AI stocks money can buy.

Story Continues

If Alphabet continues to dip amid broader market pressure, the stock will become an even more compelling buy. Admittedly, Alphabet's AI investments are expensive. Management is pumping $175 billion to $185 billion into AI and data centers this year alone. But remember, Alphabet is funding most of this with profits from its existing ad and cloud businesses.

Alphabet is also weaving AI into existing products and services that people are already happily using, and some are even paying for. That needs to continue, but Alphabet is as well-positioned to realize a strong return on AI investments as any other hyperscaler.

news.Title: The Biggest Mistake Artificial Intelligence (AI) Investors Can Make Right Now Is Selling. Here's What I'm Doing Instead.
news.Content:
Without a doubt, investors have soured on stocks tied to artificial intelligence (AI) in the last few months. In many cases, the capital expenditures (capex) involved are staggering even for the wealthiest tech companies. Also, AI has disrupted business models, particularly in the software as a service (SaaS) industry, leaving some investors confused as to where they should deploy their capital.

Nonetheless, in most cases, this does not mean investors should sell AI stocks . Instead of panicking, they should take one specific approach instead.

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

Addressing a key concern with AI stocks

Admittedly, the "don't sell" message comes with a caveat. Investors want to make sure to invest in the top companies in specific niches within AI. If a stock is not No. 1 or No. 2 in a specific AI market, investors should consider selling before things get worse , as advised by former GE Aerospace CEO Jack Welch.

Long-time investors might remember that Alphabet pushed aside search engine competitors like Altavista and Excite in the 1990s. Likewise, e-commerce investors may recall how Amazon outlasted eToys.com and other peers.

Investors should remember that the AI industry has almost certainly led to the formation of companies that are likely to fail in a similar fashion. If they can identify such companies early, they should not hesitate to sell.

How to invest in AI moving forward

However, when it comes to the top stocks in specific AI markets, selling will probably turn out to be the biggest investing mistake one can make.

Grand View Research forecasts that the AI market, which was worth almost $391 billion in 2025, will grow to nearly $3.5 trillion by 2033. That amounts to a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of close to 31%. Thus, it is highly likely that the top AI stocks will rise in the long run.

Admittedly, that prediction does not speak to what may happen to AI stocks in the near term. With all of the noise in the market regarding AI uncertainty, conflict in the Middle East, and other challenges, anything can happen in the short term. If that leads to further stock price declines, it will almost certainly lead to many of the less committed shareholders selling. Investors should resist that temptation.

Once they commit to holding, one way they can benefit from the volatility is by dollar-cost averaging (DCA). DCA means that one invests a fixed amount in a given period without regard to a stock's price.

Story Continues

Investors cannot predict a bottom with certainty. Still, with DCA, they can protect themselves regardless of a stock's near-term direction. If prices continue to fall, investing a fixed amount will buy more shares. Conversely, should stock prices turn around, one can know they bought some shares near the bottom.

In my own case, I am already heavily invested in AI. However, I have also kept cash available, and if I see one of my AI stocks fall to a significantly lower price, I will add a small number of shares, essentially employing a variation of the DCA strategy with irregular buy times.

This has been my approach with CoreWeave (NASDAQ: CRWV) . Since it is one of the leaders in AI native cloud, it appears to meet the No. 1 or No. 2 criteria within that specific niche. Also, it has periodically fallen to its lowest levels since just after its initial public offering (IPO) in recent weeks, and I have added a small number of shares at such times.

That strategy offers the benefit of lowering my overall cost basis on the stock. Moreover, it also makes it easier to sell the initial shares I bought at a higher price if CoreWeave recovers and becomes an excessively large percentage of my portfolio.

Ultimately, whether one adds shares at regular or irregular intervals, using the DCA approach should allow investors to buy top stocks on sale. That should benefit investors greatly when the likely recovery comes to pass.

Moving forward with AI stocks

Instead of selling the top AI stocks, investors should use the current sell-off to buy shares at discounted prices.

Admittedly, investors need to remove AI stocks that are not leaders in a given market. However, once an investor has only market leaders left, they have an excellent opportunity to employ DCA investing. That approach allows investors to buy at lower prices while preserving capital in case the market keeps falling.

news.Title: 停火利多鈍化！台股震盪拉尾收紅，逾60檔強勢漲停
news.Content:
【財訊快報／黃冠豪】美國與伊朗達成為期兩週的臨時停火協議，帶動國際油價跌破100美元關卡，市場風險情緒明顯回溫，美股主要指數週三（8日）大幅攀升。不過台股今（9）日開盤僅小幅反映利多，以34,779.96點開出後隨即陷入震盪，終場在神山拉尾之下，加權指數收34,861.16點，上漲99.78點或0.29%，成交量達8,457.67億元，顯示資金動能仍在，但追價轉趨謹慎。 權值股表現分歧，台積電(2330)收在1,955元、拉尾盤上漲5元，持續穩盤角色；鴻海(2317)收200元、下跌1.5元；聯發科(2454)收1,575元、小跌5元；廣達(2382)收313元、上漲5.5元；台達電(2308)收1,645元、下跌20元；日月光投控(3711)收392元、上漲9元；聯電(2303)收60元、小跌0.3元；大立光(3008)則收在2,280元平盤，顯示電子權值股漲跌互見，指數呈現高檔震盪整理。

值得注意的是，今日盤面仍有超過60檔個股攻上漲停，反映市場資金熱度不減，中小型股與題材股持續活躍。在停火利多帶來的「股市人道走廊」氛圍下，資金積極尋找具族群性的強勢標的。整體而言，台股在利多支撐下維持多頭格局，但短線震盪加劇，操作上宜精選族群強勢股，靈活因應盤勢變化。

news.Title: 《台股盤後》台積擺尾 翻紅收漲99點/日K連三紅
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-04-09 15:55:37 新聞中心 發佈

美伊達成停火兩周協議，美股四大指數週三全面走揚，惟盤後傳出中東局勢不確定性仍高，美股電子盤見走跌、原油期貨亦走高下，導致台股今(9)日雖受惠費半指數創高效應，早盤一度漲逾百點，惟主要電子權值股台達電/鴻海/聯發科皆收黑、DRAM股如南亞科又轉跌，幸賴盤中有AI代工股廣達、緯創等翻紅，加上最後一盤台積電、國泰金、中鋼見大單拉抬，加權指數才由黑翻紅，終場收在34861.16點，上漲99.78點或0.29%、日K連三紅，成交量8442.86億元。

延續美股盤後電子盤漲勢，美股週三四大指數全面跳漲，並引爆軋空行情，其中那斯達克指數創3月11日以來收盤新高，費城半導體指數則創收盤新高。惟今日亞股受制美伊停火協議傳出變數，日經225指數雖一度翻紅、然終場收跌0.73%，主要係Advantest、軟銀均出現獲利了結壓力，分別收跌1.7%、1.2%；韓股同樣在三星電子跌3%、SK HYNIX跌3.4%下，終場收跌1.61%。

台股電子族群今日漲跌互見，亮點部分，3月營收創高的金像電漲停、廣達漲1.8%，致茂、健策、國巨*等也都表現不俗，另外面板族群友達漲停、群創收漲2.9%，不過上日強勢的南亞科下挫逾8%、威剛跌6%、台達電跌1.2%，主要權值股鴻海、聯發科也收黑；輔以題材面強勢的ABF載板指標股欣興早盤就見走弱、僅收漲0.8%，3月營收創高的鴻勁亦收跌0.4%，整體AI供應鏈表現分化下，無法激起市場追價意願。

在29大類股表現上，化工股表現最佳、收漲3.5%，主要係受惠基本面與原物料題材推升，其中長興、雙鍵、永光都衝上漲停；光電股在面板與相關供應鏈利多支撐下、收漲2.2%，漲幅居次；電子零組件股收漲1.4%、主要係訂單及庫存回補題材；橡膠股收漲1.43%、漲幅居第四，主要係正新收漲2.1%的帶動效應。至於弱勢類股部分，以油電燃氣跌2.6%、表現最差，主要係上日原油期貨重挫的影響；運動休閒、電器電纜類股分別跌2.5%、1.4%，跌幅居第二與第三。

三大法人動向方面，今日三大法人總計買超394.36億元；其中，外資及陸資(不含外資自營商)買超317.79億元，投信買超14.61億元，自營商買超61.95億元。

《台股盤後》量縮收漲657點，收復月線

《台股盤後》收漲826點重返33K；月線得而復失

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

news.Title: Prediction: This Will Be Microsoft's Stock Price Next Year
news.Content:
Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT) has had a terrible start to 2026. It's down more than 20% to start, but it's also off more than 30% from its all-time high. That's not a normal experience for Microsoft, as it has been down 30% or more from an all-time high only once in the past decade.

There has seldom been a better time to scoop up Microsoft shares, and I think its stock price will be much higher in 2027. How much higher? Let's take a look.

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

Microsoft's stock is set to deliver strong returns based on valuation alone

If Microsoft was overvalued when its sell-off began, then this drop is warranted, and it isn't the buying opportunity many investors have made it out to be. Since 2020, Microsoft has traded at an earnings valuation in the mid-30s.

One thing to note is that its current valuation of 23.4 times earnings is nearly the same as that of the S&P 500 , which trades at 23.6 times earnings. So Microsoft has essentially lost its premium to the market.

In light of Wall Street analyst growth projections and Microsoft's past results, this doesn't make a ton of sense. During its most recent quarter, Microsoft posted solid 17% revenue growth. Next quarter, analysts expect 16% growth, and they expect 15% the quarter after that. For a stock to be growing faster than the market, most investors set the bar at 10% growth. Microsoft is clearly above this threshold, so I think it deserves a premium to the market. But just how much? Let's look at its peers.

I think the most comparable stocks to Microsoft are Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOG) (NASDAQ: GOOGL) and Apple (NASDAQ: AAPL) , as these are two high-margin, high-quality businesses with strong track records of execution. Alphabet and Apple trade for 27.3 and 32.4 times earnings, respectively. I think a fair valuation for Microsoft is likely between the two at 30 times earnings.

Wall Street projects Microsoft will generate $19 in earnings per share at the end of fiscal year 2027 (ending June 30, 2027). A stock that generates $19 in earnings at a 30 times earnings valuation would be valued at $570 per share.

That represents a 52% upside in just over a year, which makes Microsoft a no-brainer stock to buy right now .

news.Title: Should You Buy SpaceX Stock When It IPOs at a $2 Trillion Valuation?
news.Content:
SpaceX just confidentially filed for what could be the largest initial public offering in history. The company is targeting a valuation of $2 trillion and plans to raise roughly $75 billion when it lists, potentially this summer.

When that occurs, retail investors will for the first time have a chance to own a piece of Elon Musk's rocket and satellite empire .

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

SpaceX IPO: What we know so far

There's a lot of excitement around this IPO -- and I get it. Apart from my undying love for rockets and all things space exploration, the company has had one of the most impressive business trajectories of any private company over the last two decades. It dominates the space launch market, and its satellite internet division, Starlink, is generating significant operating profits.

SpaceX as a whole made roughly $8 billion in EBITDA (earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization) on $15 billion to $16 billion in revenue last year.

And now, the company includes the social media platform X, Musk's artificial intelligence (AI) project xAI, as well as the brain-chip company Neuralink.

But is that combination really worth $2 trillion today? Let's look at the math.

The math behind the $2 trillion valuation

Projections for the combined company's revenue next year sit at around $24 billion. A $2 trillion valuation would mean IPO investors are paying more than 80 times sales for the stock. That would be an astronomically expensive valuation, especially for a company in the trillion-dollar club -- of which there are only 11 current members.

Nvidia, at the peak of its AI-driven rally, traded at only 40 to 45 times revenue. So you can see how extreme the premium SpaceX is seeking would be compared to other companies with at least a $1 trillion market cap in the table below.

Company

Market Cap

Price-to-Sales Ratio (TTM)

Nvidia

$4.3 trillion

20.1

Apple

$3.7 trillion

Alphabet

Microsoft

$2.8 trillion

Amazon

$2.3 trillion

Taiwan Semiconductor

$1.8 trillion

14.9

Saudi Aramco

$1.7 trillion

Broadcom

$1.6 trillion

22.4

Meta Platform

$1.4 trillion

Tesla

$1.3 trillion

13.4

Berkshire Hathaway

$1.0 trillion

Data source: tikr.com. TTM = Trailing 12 months. Data as of April 7, 2026.

Keep in mind that these P/S ratios are based on these companies' sales from the last year. SpaceX's P/S of 75 reflects its forward expected earnings. As such, the massive valuation disparity is even worse than it looks in the table.

Story Continues

Why the retail investor allocation is a red flag

Beyond this, SpaceX is allocating 30% of its IPO shares to retail investors -- that's three to six times the norm. This may seem generous at first blush, but it seems opportunistic to me -- as if the company is seeking to capitalize on the extreme hype surrounding the IPO. I think the company believes much of the "smart money" may be hesitant to buy in at this valuation.

Is SpaceX stock a buy around the IPO?

SpaceX is certainly an impressive company, and I mean, it builds reusable rockets -- that's just cool.

But if you buy this stock at 80 times forward revenue, you'd need everything to go perfectly for years for the company to even grow into its valuation, let alone deliver meaningful upside.

And while we are still waiting for the S-1 filing that will reveal the full financial picture, I suspect the company's balance sheet and cash flows won't be pretty. And the xAI acquisition detracts rather than adds value, in my opinion. That portion of the business is saddled with debt and incurred a more than $1.4 billion loss on just $107 million in revenue in the last quarter before it was absorbed into SpaceX.

I'm not saying to avoid SpaceX shares entirely. But I would wait for more information and a more reasonable valuation. I think you'll get your chance at that following the IPO -- mega-IPOs don't have a great track record of holding their value in the near term.

Don’t miss this second chance at a potentially lucrative opportunity

Ever feel like you missed the boat in buying the most successful stocks? Then you’ll want to hear this.

On rare occasions, our expert team of analysts issues a “Double Down” stock recommendation for companies that they think are about to pop. If you’re worried you’ve already missed your chance to invest, now is the best time to buy before it’s too late. And the numbers speak for themselves:

Nvidia: if you invested $1,000 when we doubled down in 2009, you’d have $461,967 !*

Apple: if you invested $1,000 when we doubled down in 2008, you’d have $48,271 !*

Netflix: if you invested $1,000 when we doubled down in 2004, you’d have $532,929 !*

Right now, we’re issuing “Double Down” alerts for three incredible companies , available when you join Stock Advisor , and there may not be another chance like this anytime soon.

See the 3 stocks »

*Stock Advisor returns as of April 6, 2026

Johnny Rice has no position in any of the stocks mentioned. The Motley Fool has positions in and recommends Alphabet, Amazon, Apple, Berkshire Hathaway, Microsoft, Nvidia, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing, and Walmart and is short shares of Apple. The Motley Fool recommends Broadcom. The Motley Fool has a disclosure policy .

news.Title: 【Follow法人】外資倒貨記憶體四雄！反手掃貨13萬張友達 燿華國巨也上榜
news.Content:
（下午4時46分更新買賣超個股）

台股今（9）日終場收在34,861點，收漲99點。三大法人聯袂買超394.36億元，其中外資回補317.79億元，連3日買超累計掃貨1596億元。顧德投顧分析師張家豪指出，雖然外資大幅回補3月避險賣出的部位，但後續台積電、指數還是會有空間向上，但短線上在法人籌碼仍要注意，下周三將迎來台指期結算，外資可能有所動作，這是短線上需注意的變數。觀察外資買賣超個股，外資今日將記憶體四雄全數調節，佔據賣超榜前四名，不過反手掃貨13萬張友達、低軌衛星飆股燿華3.3萬張，以及被動元件龍頭國巨1.9萬張。

外資買超前三大：友達、0050、中鋼

外資大買友達（2409）130,911張居台股之冠；元大台灣50（0050）再度受到青睞，繼續買超44,119張，中鋼（2002）也獲買超38,144張。

值得留意的是，昨日公布營收的緯創、廣達都雙雙獲得外資資金進駐，分別獲1.5萬張以及1.4萬張的買超；被動元件龍頭國巨也在營收創高下，獲外資1.9萬張買超；至於今日強漲的低軌衛星飆股燿華也同步上榜，買超張數達3.3萬張。

外資賣超前三大： 力積電 、 南亞科 、 旺宏

外資今日主要賣超集中記憶體族群，賣超前三大依序是力積電（6770）49,946張、南亞科（2408）33,225張、旺宏（2337）27,993張。

此外，華邦電（2344）也被外資調節2.2萬張，可說記憶體四雄全數遭砍，此外，今日一度強漲的群創也遭外資賣超1.4萬張。

外資大額回補結束了嗎？張家豪：短線注意一變因

張家豪指出，在分析外資動向時，可以用台積電作為觀察指標，畢竟台積電7成都是外資持股，先前是為了戰爭避險因此賣出降持。

不過，張家豪強調，台積電在技術面上回測1790元3次後，乖離釋放已差不多，現在都是在將3月賣出的部位回補，甚至昨日直接跳空站回1950元以上。

張家豪認為，台積電後續站穩5日均線也是一重點，其實甚至還有機會去創高，不過短線上有一點需要注意，就是下週三將迎來台指期結算，外資可能會開始有動作需留意。

外資再回補317億元 3日狂掃1596億元

根據證交所公布籌碼動向，三大法人今日合計買超394.36億元，其中外資買超317.79億元，連3買累計買超1596億元。

投信續站買方，買超14.61億元。自營商合計買超61.9億元，其中自行買賣部分買超24.67億元，避險方面買超37.28億元。

匯率方面今日台幣震盪，呈現股匯同步震盪的格局；至於外資淨空單方面，截止至昨日為3.2萬口，至今日則為33,399口。

許如鎧／財經特派記者，主跑經濟部、電子電信、能源等

news.Title: Prediction: This Trillion-Dollar AI Titan Will Outperform Nvidia Through the End of 2027
news.Content: Nvidia has been one of the best stocks to own since 2023. But I think it could give up that title this year to Broadcom (NASDAQ: AVGO) . While I still think Nvidia is a great investment overall, I think Broadcom could outperform it ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Broadcom (AVGO) is predicted to outperform Nvidia through the end of 2027 due to its custom AI chip business.
• Broadcom is partnering with hyperscalers to design application-specific integrated circuits (ASICs) for AI workloads.
• These custom chips offer cheaper inference and training costs compared to GPUs for specific scenarios.
• Broadcom expects its custom AI chip business to generate over $100 billion annually by 2027, more than tripling its current business.
• The stock is considered an excellent buy, especially after a recent 25% dip from its all-time high.
news.Keywords: Broadcom, AVGO, AI chips, custom ASICs, hyperscalers, outperformance, growth

news.Title: 台積電熊本效應 台灣電動機車整合企業搶進日本
news.Content:
財經中心／陳孟暄 鄭國陽 台北報導

台積電進駐熊本，帶動產業與人口快速成長，台灣業者看準商機，進軍日本市場，導入電動機車、換電系統，更整合支 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 受台積電熊本設廠效應影響，台灣電動機車整合企業搶進日本市場。
• 業者將導入電動機車、換電系統，並整合支付與生活服務，打造智慧城市移動新模式。
• 預計第三季在日本熊本上線，初期鎖定觀光客與當地通勤族。
• 此舉有助於改善當地交通壅塞問題，並提升熊本縣民生活品質。
news.Keywords: 台積電, 熊本效應, 電動機車, 智慧移動, 日本市場

news.Title: The Market Just Gave You a Rare Chance to Buy These 3 AI Stocks at a Discount
news.Content: Even in the middle of a bull market, it's not uncommon to see a market pullback or sector rotation. And with the war with Iran, the artificial intelligence (AI) stocks that have been leading the market higher have pulled back, with investors rotating into energy and value stocks. However, this is likely to be a temporary phenomenon. While value stocks will have their day, it is growth ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia (NVDA) is identified as the AI growth engine, trading at a forward P/E of 21 for fiscal 2027 estimates, down 17% from its highs.
• The company has evolved into an end-to-end AI infrastructure provider, leading in AI model training and offering full server racks for inference.
• Micron (MU) shares are down 20% from highs, trading at a forward P/E below 4 times fiscal 2027 estimates, benefiting from High Bandwidth Memory (HBM) demand.
• Micron is securing longer-term (3-5 year) DRAM contracts, providing a new business floor.
• Meta Platforms (META) is down nearly 30% from highs, trading at a forward P/E below 19, and is benefiting from AI investments that accelerate revenue growth.
news.Keywords: Nvidia, NVDA, AI, growth stocks, discount, valuation, Micron, MU, Meta, META, AI infrastructure

news.Title: 2 Monster AI Stocks to Hold for the Next 10 Years
news.Content: The artificial intelligence (AI) revolution is just getting started. Global consultancy McKinsey & Co. estimates that companies will invest "almost $7 trillion in global data center infrastructure capital expenditures by 2030." The firm's report observes that this spending figure is roughly the size of the combined GDP of Japan and Germany. "In the United States, AI-related capital expenditures account for about 5% of GDP and have been growing at high-single- to low-double-digit pace," the report ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Global data center infrastructure capital expenditures are estimated to reach nearly $7 trillion by 2030.
• AI-related capital expenditures account for about 5% of U.S. GDP and are growing at high-single to low-double-digit rates.
• Tesla (TSLA) is investing heavily in AI, with expected capital expenditures dominated by AI investments for self-driving capabilities and robotaxis.
• Rivian (RIVN) is also investing heavily in AI and autonomy, pushing out its profitability timeline due to elevated capex.
• NuScale Power (SMR) is positioned to benefit from rising AI spending, with AI's share of U.S. electricity demand expected to triple from 4.3% to 11.7% by 2030.
news.Keywords: AI, data centers, capital expenditures, energy demand, EV, autonomy, nuclear power

news.Title: 曾經被鴻海甩很遠！ 謝金河點名「這檔股」：低調的神山在崛起
news.Content: 台股已不光是台積電一個人的武林，謝金河指出，另一座低調的神山台達電正在崛起，憑藉AI電源與散熱方案，一年內市值翻倍衝破4兆元躍居二哥，與泰達電合體規模達8兆，創造出台 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 謝金河點名台達電為「低調的神山」，市值一年內翻倍衝破4兆元，躍居台灣第二大市值企業。
• 台達電的成長動能主要來自AI電源與散熱方案，提供了完整的解決方案。
• 台達電去年營收5548.85億元，淨利601.08億元，EPS達23.14元，創下歷史新猷。
• 台達電市值已超越鴻海，展現台灣企業傳承典範。
news.Keywords: 台達電, AI電源, 散熱方案, 市值, 企業傳承

news.Title: Prediction: This AI Stock Will Join the S&P 500 Before Year-End
news.Content: A stock doesn't necessarily need to be a component of the S&P 500 index (SNPINDEX: ^GSPC) to be worth owning. Inclusion in the well-known barometer of the U.S. equity market, however, is still a great sign that a company has grown into a well-established name with real staying power. It also ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Symbiotic (SYM) is an AI robotics outfit that could be added to the S&P 500.
• Symbiotic fully automates warehouses with robotic arms, conveyor belts, and self-driving carts, with Walmart as a key customer.
• The company sold and serviced $2.2 billion worth of robotics last year, up 25% year over year.
• The worldwide AI robotics industry is projected to grow at nearly 21% annually through 2034, reaching nearly $50 billion per year.
• Symbiotic's market capitalization is over $30 billion, meeting the S&P 500's minimum market cap criterion.
news.Keywords: Symbiotic, AI robotics, automation, warehouse, S&P 500, market cap, growth

news.AI_Summary:
• 野村投信表示，AI產業需求展望仍是支撐台股長期趨勢的核心動能。
• 儘管美伊戰事對市場情緒造成干擾，但中長期AI需求成長及CSP投入力道不減，台股中長線有撐。
• 台灣身處全球半導體與AI供應鏈關鍵位置，產業基本面具備中長期支撐力。
• 野村投信持續看好AI供應鏈，建議關注半導體、PCB/CCL、電源管理、光通訊與載板等次產業。

news.Title: Think Nvidia is the Best Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stock to Buy? Think Again. Buy This Growth Stock Instead.
news.Content: There is nothing wrong with Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) as a business. On the contrary, it's seeing explosive growth. Its fourth quarter of fiscal 2026 was remarkable, with revenue rising 73% year over year to $68.1 billion and data center revenue climbing 75% to $62.3 billion. Additionally, management guided for first-quarter fiscal 2027 revenue of about $78 billion -- a huge sequential uptick. Will AI create ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia (NVDA) reported remarkable Q4 fiscal 2026 results with revenue up 73% year-over-year to $68.1 billion, and data center revenue up 75% to $62.3 billion.
• Management guided for Q1 fiscal 2027 revenue of about $78 billion.
• Concerns about Nvidia include chip industry cyclicality, limited business diversification, and premium valuation.
• Alphabet (GOOG/GOOGL) is presented as an alternative, with AI showing up in Search, Cloud growth, subscriptions, and monetization.
• Alphabet's Q4 2025 revenue rose 18% year-over-year to $113.8 billion, with Google Search revenue up 17% to $63.1 billion.
news.Keywords: Nvidia, NVDA, Alphabet, GOOGL, AI, valuation, diversification, cloud, search

news.Title: Tesla Stock's Rough Year Continues. Time to Buy the Stock?
news.Content: Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) shareholders are enduring a difficult stretch. And management's first-quarter delivery results failed to reverse the negative momentum, as the electric vehicle maker missed Wall Street's expectations. The stock is down almost 24% year to date. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue » It's not surprising that shares are having a tough time. The underlying data reveals a business currently experiencing ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Tesla (TSLA) shareholders are facing a difficult stretch, with the stock down almost 24% year to date.
• Q1 deliveries missed expectations at 358,023 vehicles, a 14.4% sequential drop, and inventory built up with 50,000 unsold vehicles.
• Energy storage deployments plummeted 38% sequentially to 8.8 GWh.
• The company is pivoting towards capital-intensive AI and robotics projects, forecasting capital expenditures exceeding $20 billion this year.
• The stock trades at a P/E ratio of about 320, assuming flawless execution and success in unproven initiatives.
news.Keywords: Tesla, TSLA, deliveries, inventory, energy storage, AI, robotics, capital expenditures, valuation

news.Title: Why Amazon Stock Jumped Today
news.Content: Shares of Amazon.com (NASDAQ: AMZN) climbed on Wednesday, following several positive developments. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? news.AI_Summary:
• Amazon (AMZN) shares climbed due to a ceasefire in Iran easing energy price concerns, which directly impacts Amazon's shipping costs and data center electricity prices.
• BNP Paribas analyst Nick Jones sees Amazon's projected $200 billion in 2026 capital expenditures as enabling AI-driven revenue gains.
• Jones forecasts Amazon's share price to rise approximately 45% to $320, driven by AI-related computing demand.

news.Title: Oracle's Sales Are Soaring, But Its Stock Is Falling. Time to Buy?
news.Content: Shares of Oracle (NYSE: ORCL) have hit a brutal rough patch in early 2026. After logging astronomical gains last year and reaching a 52-week high of $345.72 in September, the tech giant's stock has plunged. As of this writing, shares are down about 26% year to date and have shed more than half their value since their September peak. This sharp decline occurs as a handful of once-soaring artificial intelligence (AI) stocks pause (and, in some cases, pull back) to cool off after their ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Oracle (ORCL) shares have fallen about 26% year to date and over 50% from their peak.
• Despite the stock drop, Oracle reported record sales growth, with total fiscal Q3 revenue up 22% year over year to $17.2 billion.
• Cloud infrastructure revenue skyrocketed 84% year over year to $4.9 billion.
• The company's remaining performance obligations (RPO) reached $553 billion, driven by large-scale AI agreements.
• Investors are concerned about Oracle's $45 billion to $50 billion in planned debt and equity financing for AI infrastructure, potentially pressuring free cash flow.
news.Keywords: Oracle, ORCL, cloud growth, AI agreements, RPO, capital expenditures, debt financing, margins

news.Title: The Green Machine Finds a Second Gear as AI Data Centers Drive 50% Order Growth
news.Content: For nearly two centuries, Deere (NYSE: DE) has been synonymous with the American farmer. But after the company reported first-quarter earnings in February, a new growth story began to emerge. It didn't come from the company's highly publicized software strategy or its autonomous tractors. It came from its construction and forestry (C&F) division, ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Deere's (DE) construction and forestry division saw a 50% jump in order backlog, driven by data center build-outs for AI.
• Construction business revenue grew 34% year-over-year, with AI hyperscalers like Amazon, Microsoft, and Alphabet driving demand for heavy equipment.
• This provides a non-cyclical tailwind while the agricultural cycle finds its footing.

• Deere raised earnings guidance to $4.5 billion-$5.0 billion and operating cash flow projection by $500 million, trading at a premium valuation.

news.Title: The Best Way to Invest in SpaceX Before Its IPO
news.Content: SpaceX has filed to go public, reportedly targeting a valuation of more than $2 trillion. That would easily make it the largest initial public offering (IPO) in history. If it achieves exactly a $2 trillion valuation, that would make it the sixth-largest public company in the ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Alphabet (GOOGL) is a longtime investor in SpaceX, having invested $900 million for a 7.5% stake in 2015.
• If SpaceX IPOs at a $2 trillion valuation, Alphabet's stake could be worth $150 billion, a 166-fold profit.
• Alphabet may sell its SpaceX shares to fund AI infrastructure investments.
• Alphabet is competing for AI supremacy and increasing its cloud computing footprint.
• Alphabet's stock is down around 15% from its all-time high, making it a potential buying opportunity.
news.Keywords: Alphabet, GOOGL, SpaceX, IPO, investment, AI infrastructure, cloud computing, valuation

news.AI_Summary:
• Teradyne (TER) surged to an all-time high, up 11.42%, following news of Intel Corp.'s (INTC) involvement in Elon Musk's Terafab project.
• Intel will join the Terafab project with SpaceX, xAI, and Tesla to refactor silicon fab technology for 1 terawatt of compute annually.

news.Title: Bank of America resets Broadcom stock forecast
news.Content: Broadcom ( AVGO ) stock is up, trading 4.28% higher at $348.27 at the time of writing, Wednesday morning, April 8, according to Yahoo Finance . The company settled an important question for many investors, and they are reacting positively. The question is, how secure are Broadcom’s revenue streams? The company’s CEO, Hock Tan, previously addressed this question during the Q1 earnings call . Tan specifically answered the question of whether LLM makers could start making their own chips without Broadcom’s help. ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Broadcom (AVGO) stock is up 4.28% following the settlement of questions regarding its revenue stream security.
• The company secured long-term agreements with Google and Anthropic for custom Tensor Processing Units (TPUs) and networking components through 2031.
• Anthropic will access approximately 3.5 gigawatts of AI compute capacity through Broadcom starting in 2027.
• Bank of America believes these TPU deals solidify Broadcom's role as a main TPU design partner and extend its multi-year AI supply visibility.
• Analysts expect Broadcom to gain AI accelerator market share, growing from less than 10% in 2025 to approximately 15%.

news.Title: Walmart quietly tackling Tesla and EV owners' biggest problem
news.Content: As the driver of an electric vehicle, one clear thing dampens my enjoyment of my BMW i3. It's not the lack of loud engine noises, or the fact that my car essentially operates in silence. It's always feeling insecure about finding a place to charge. Florida, where I live, has charging stations owned by Florida Power & Light, the dominant electricity provider in the state. The stations are common in some areas (especially along the Florida Turnpike) but harder to find in many places. They're also hit-or-miss when it comes to actually being operational. Earlier this week, for example, at ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Walmart is expanding its EV fast-charging network, aiming to build it at thousands of locations coast-to-coast by 2030.
• The company increased its EV charging network size by 50% in just two months.
• Approximately 90% of the U.S. population lives within 10 miles of a Walmart or Sam's Club.
• The U.S. is expected to need roughly 1.2 million public EV chargers by 2030, a significant increase from the current ~219,000.
• Walmart's expansion addresses the lack of convenient and reliable public charging infrastructure for EV owners.
news.Keywords: Walmart, EV charging, infrastructure, network expansion, public charging, convenience, reliability

news.Title: Nvidia vs. Micron: Which AI Chip Stock Has More Upside Potential?
news.Content: Developing artificial intelligence (AI) requires substantial computing power, which is why it typically occurs in large, centralized data centers. This infrastructure includes thousands of specialized chips called graphics processing units (GPUs) specifically designed for data-intensive AI workloads. High-bandwidth memory (HBM) is also a critical component in the hardware stack because it stores data in a ready state until GPUs are ready to process it. A low memory capacity can cause bottlenecks and force GPUs to pause their workloads while they wait to receive more data, whereas a high ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia (NVDA) is the market leader in AI data center chips, with its Blackwell-based GB300 GPU offering significant performance improvements.
• Nvidia will ship its new Vera Rubin semiconductor platform in the second half of the year, promising substantial AI model training efficiency.
• Nvidia generated $215.9 billion in revenue in fiscal year 2026, with a P/E ratio of 36.1, considered a discount to its 10-year average.
• Micron (MU) offers high-capacity HBM3E and HBM4 memory solutions, used by Nvidia for its GPUs.
• Micron's fiscal 2026 second-quarter results showed strong performance, with potential for growth in PC and smartphone memory markets.
news.Keywords: Nvidia, NVDA, Micron, MU, AI chips, GPUs, HBM, semiconductor, data center, performance

news.Title: Why Super Micro Computer Stock Crashed 29.7% in March But Is Moving Higher in April
news.Content: Super Micro Computer (NASDAQ: SMCI) stock plummeted in March after one of its co-founders and two other people connected to the company were hit with smuggling charges . The California-based server specialist's shares fell 29.7% in the month, according to data from S&P Global Market Intelligence . Meanwhile, the ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Super Micro Computer (SMCI) stock fell 29.7% in March and is down roughly 61.5% from its 52-week high.
• The decline followed news of smuggling charges against affiliated individuals for allegedly diverting banned AI chips to China.
• Servers containing $2.5 billion worth of Nvidia banned AI chips were allegedly smuggled to Chinese customers from 2024 to 2025.
• Supermicro's business relies heavily on Nvidia components, with Nvidia chips making up around 70% of its revenue.
• The company is conducting an independent investigation, and its stock could remain volatile.
news.Keywords: Super Micro Computer, SMCI, Nvidia, AI chips, smuggling charges, export controls, revenue concentration, volatility

news.Title: Apple’s foldable iPhone remains on track for September debut
news.Content: Apple's stock had a turbulent April 7. It took two competing reports and most of a trading session to stabilize. Shares fell as much as 5% after Nikkei Asia reported engineering setbacks in the early test production phase of the company's first foldable iPhone. Then Bloomberg 's Mark Gurman reported that the device remains on track for a September launch alongside the iPhone 18 Pro and iPhone 18 Max, and shares pared their losses. What media reports said about the foldable iPhone The Nikkei report , published April 6, described engineering challenges serious enough ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Apple's (AAPL) stock experienced volatility due to conflicting reports about its first foldable iPhone.
• Nikkei Asia reported engineering setbacks threatening the mass-production timeline, while Bloomberg indicated the device remains on track for a September launch.
• The foldable iPhone is expected to cost over $2,000 and is key to Apple's iPhone lineup revamp.
• A slipped timeline would give rivals more runway in the foldable market, which Samsung has participated in since 2019.
• App Store performance data also added pressure, with overall growth around 7% and gaming revenues declining 1%.
news.Keywords: Apple, AAPL, foldable iPhone, supply chain, engineering setbacks, market entry, App Store, revenue

news.Title: If I Had $5,000 to Invest in Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stocks After the Nasdaq Correction, I'd Buy These 3
news.Content: On March 26, the Nasdaq Composite (NASDAQINDEX: ^IXIC) index officially entered correction territory, trading more than 10% below its recent peak. The downward pressure wasn't driven by any single narrative but rather by a cocktail of headwinds, including sticky inflation, tariffs, consumer anxiety, a rotation out of growth stocks , and geopolitics. While declines like these feel dramatic in the moment, historically speaking, they tend to offer lucrative buying opportunities. Remember, corrections are not crashes -- they are resets. Investors who have dry powder ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia (NVDA) is central to AI infrastructure buildout, generating record revenues and earnings with a $1 trillion order book through 2027.
• Nvidia's stock trades at a lower forward P/E ratio than the S&P 500, its lowest in 13 years, presenting a buying opportunity during the Nasdaq correction.
• Demand for Nvidia's chips remains strong despite macroeconomic factors, with sovereign AI projects accelerating.
• Microsoft (MSFT) has scaled its Azure platform into a hyperscaler rival after investing in OpenAI, but faces concerns over ballooning capex and concentration on OpenAI.
• The pullback in Microsoft stock is attributed to capex concerns and reliance on OpenAI, despite its strong ecosystem.
news.Keywords: Nvidia, NVDA, Microsoft, MSFT, AI, Nasdaq correction, valuation, order book, capex, sentiment

news.Title: Morgan Stanley delivers blunt message to Tesla stock investors
news.Content: Tesla’s ( TSLA ) recent drop has investors asking the tough questions, but Morgan Stanley analyst Andrew Percoco has a clear response. The bank reiterated an equal-weight rating on the stock while keeping its $415 price target , a 17% upside from current levels. Tesla stock, though, has been under duress of late after a major delivery miss in Q1 , rattling confidence, sparking concerns over demand and margins. On top of that, there’s a new wrinkle. Tesla’s energy storage business, which has performed consistently over the years, also disappointed. Coupled with a steep drop in deliveries, it was enough ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Morgan Stanley reiterated an Equal-Weight rating on Tesla (TSLA) with a $415 price target, implying 17% upside.
• Tesla's Q1 delivery miss and disappointment in the energy storage segment have rattled investor confidence.
• Energy storage deployments fell 15.4% year-over-year, marking the first decline since 2022.
• Morgan Stanley views the energy storage miss as a delay rather than a trend, citing improving economics and demand from data centers.
• The firm believes Tesla's valuation hinges on its ability to scale an unsupervised Robotaxi fleet, with Austin and seven new city launches as key signals.
news.Keywords: Tesla, TSLA, Morgan Stanley, analyst rating, deliveries, energy storage, robotaxi, AI, valuation

news.Title: These Growth Stocks Surged 300% and 1,400% While Everyone Was Watching Nvidia, and They Are Still Cheap. Here's Why.
news.Content: While Nvidia remains the poster child for the artificial intelligence (AI) infrastructure buildout, it has been far from the best-performing stock in the space over the past year. While Nvidia's stock is up a strong 60% over this period, Micron Technology (NASDAQ: MU) has a 300% gain, and Sandisk (NASDAQ: SNDK) is up nearly 1,400%. Micron and Sandisk are both riding strong trends in the memory market, although they are involved in different aspects of it. What's even ...
news.AI_Summary:
• While Nvidia (NVDA) is the AI infrastructure leader, Micron Technology (MU) has gained 300% and Sandisk (SNDK) nearly 1,400% over the past year.
• Micron and Sandisk are benefiting from strong trends in the memory market, particularly High Bandwidth Memory (HBM) for AI chips.
• Micron trades at a forward P/E of 3.7 times fiscal 2027 estimates, while Sandisk trades at an 8 times multiple for fiscal 2027.
• The memory market is cyclical, but the current supercycle is backed by structural AI growth, especially for HBM.
• DRAM contracts are shifting to longer terms (3-5 years) due to HBM demand, benefiting memory makers.
news.Keywords: Nvidia, NVDA, Micron, MU, Sandisk, SNDK, AI, memory market, HBM, DRAM, valuation

news.Title: Why Plug Power Stock Jumped 26% in March
news.Content: Plug Power (NASDAQ: PLUG) was one of the biggest surprises of March. The stock that fell nearly 34% in the four months through February jumped 26.3% last month, according to data provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence . Plug Power is still a loss-making company, but two critical ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Plug Power (PLUG) stock jumped 26.3% in March, recovering from a nearly 34% decline through February.
• The company achieved its first-ever positive gross profit of $5.5 million (2.4% gross margin) in Q4, a significant improvement from negative margins previously.
• Revenue surged 17.6% year over year, beating analyst estimates, and cash burn declined by 26.5%.
• Analysts raised their outlook on Plug Power stock following the earnings report and leadership change.
• The company expects operating profitability by the end of 2027 and full profitability by the end of 2028, but dilution risks and loan program issues remain.
news.Keywords: Plug Power, PLUG, hydrogen, gross profit, revenue growth, cash burn, profitability, guidance, leadership change

news.Title: Stocks Finish Sharply Higher on US-Iran Ceasefire
news.Content: The S&P 500 Index ($SPX) (SPY) on Wednesday closed up +2.51%, the Dow Jones Industrial Average ($DOWI) (DIA) closed up +2.85%, and the Nasdaq 100 Index ($IUXX) (QQQ) closed up +2.90%. June E-mini S&P futures (ESM26) rose +2.52%, and June E-mini Nasdaq futures (NQM26) rose +2.90%. Global stock indexes settled sharply higher on Wednesday, with the S&P 500, the Dow Jones Industrial Average, and the Nasdaq 100 posting 4-week highs. The easing of geopolitical tensions bolstered market sentiment and fueled a risk-on rally in equity markets after the US and Iran agreed to a two-week ceasefire, and Iran pledged to ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Global stock indexes rallied sharply on Wednesday, with the S&P 500 up +2.51%, Dow Jones Industrial Average up +2.85%, and Nasdaq 100 up +2.90%.
• The rally was fueled by easing geopolitical tensions after the U.S. and Iran agreed to a two-week ceasefire and Iran pledged to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.
• Crude oil prices sank by over 15% to a 1.5-week low, easing inflation concerns and boosting bond markets.
• It remains uncertain if the ceasefire will lead to a permanent end to the Iran war, with concerns about Iran's nuclear program and ballistic missile arsenal.
• The market sentiment is cautiously optimistic, awaiting further negotiations and normalization of energy flows.
news.Keywords: Stock market, rally, Iran ceasefire, geopolitical tensions, oil prices, inflation, bond yields, market sentiment

• Hedge funds are increasing their stakes in ENTG due to its dominance in liquid filtration and high-purity chemicals required for chip manufacturing.
• The company generated $404 million in free cash flow in 2025 and is committed to reducing net leverage.
• Stan Druckenmiller's Duquesne Capital has disclosed a stake in Entegris, indicating recognition of its upside potential.
• The company's aggressive debt reduction plan and strong free cash flow are attractive to institutional investors.
news.Keywords: Entegris, ENTG, semiconductors, AI processors, materials integrity, hedge funds, free cash flow, debt reduction, Stan Druckenmiller

news.Title: 3 Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stocks That Actually Benefit From Google's TurboQuant Breakthrough
news.Content: It's been a tough past couple of weeks for Micron Technology and Sandisk shareholders. Both computer memory chipmakers have been outright upended. Blame Google parent Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOG) (NASDAQ: GOOGL) , mostly. It introduced a set of algorithms it collectively calls TurboQuant back on March 24, that purport to allow artificial intelligence (AI) computing platforms to handle the same amount of work with just one-sixth the amount of (currently very scarce) physical memory usually needed. The news immediately undermined much of the memory pricing power that's been propping up both of these stocks. This unveiling, of course, has also worked ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Google's TurboQuant algorithms could allow AI computing platforms to handle the same workload with one-sixth the memory, potentially impacting memory chipmakers like Micron and Sandisk.
• Qualcomm (QCOM) could benefit as TurboQuant may make AI more affordable, potentially boosting interest in its Snapdragon processors for mobile devices and edge computing.
• Broadcom (AVGO), a data center networking specialist, is unlikely to be negatively impacted by TurboQuant; increased efficiency could even enhance demand for AI hardware.
• Bank of America and Morgan Stanley analysts suggest TurboQuant could improve ROI for hyperscale capex, potentially increasing demand for AI hardware.
• The development may make AI more accessible to enterprises, potentially benefiting companies that provide AI infrastructure.
news.Keywords: Google, Alphabet, TurboQuant, AI, memory chips, Qualcomm, QCOM, Broadcom, AVGO, hyperscale, efficiency

news.Title: The Coming 2026 Growth Surge (& How to Ride it)
news.Content: Investors Should Understand the Market Environment When it comes to stock market investing, there are countless ways to “skin the cat” and achieve trading profitability. Investors like Whale Rock Capital Management’s Alex Sacerdote focus on finding and investing in growth and technology stocks. Meanwhile, investors like Warren Buffett seek value stocks, which typically sport low valuations, steady businesses, and are eager to return cash to shareholders through dividends or stock buybacks. Although elite investors like Sacerdote and Buffett outperform their ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Artificial intelligence (AI) is seen as a generational innovation, with companies like OpenAI and Anthropic showing significant revenue growth.
• Many growth stocks are now profitable with reasonable valuations, unlike during the dot-com bubble.
• NVIDIA (NVDA) has its lowest forward P/E ratio in over 5 years, despite its multi-year advance.
• Sandisk (SNDK) is cited as an example of robust price and volume action in 2026.
• Micron (MU) is highlighted for its liquidity, high growth, and visibility, being sold out of its entire High Bandwidth Memory production for 2026.
news.Keywords: AI, growth stocks, valuation, Nvidia, NVDA, Sandisk, SNDK, Micron, MU, momentum, liquidity

news.Title: Zuckerberg's AI Bet Yields First Proprietary Model
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Meta Platforms ( NASDAQ:META ) unveiled Muse Spark, its first AI model since CEO Mark ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Meta Platforms (META) unveiled Muse Spark, its first AI model from its Superintelligence Lab, designed for its family of apps.
• Muse Spark is a smaller, closed model initially available via Meta AI app and website, with plans for open-sourcing future versions.
• The model reportedly beats leading models from Alphabet (GOOGL), OpenAI, and Anthropic in select benchmarks for reasoning and multimodal capabilities.
• Meta is investing between $115 billion and $135 billion in AI in 2026, up from $72.22 billion in 2025.
• Meta's stock rose 7.55% intraday on the news of the Muse Spark AI model debut.
news.Keywords: Meta Platforms, META, AI model, Muse Spark, Superintelligence Lab, LLM, benchmarks, investment, stock performance

news.Title: Tesla Faces $43.9 Billion Free Cash Flow Swing As 2026 Outlook Turns Negative
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Tesla ( NASDAQ:TSLA ) is heading into what could be a difficult earnings setup with a massive reset in forward expectations that is hard to ignore. Consensus projections ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Tesla's (TSLA) forward expectations for 2026 free cash flow have swung dramatically, from a peak of $38.8 billion to a projected negative $5.1 billion.
• This shift takes Tesla from a self-funding business to potentially burning cash, with the magnitude matching its cash balance and exceeding historical free cash flow.
• Despite deteriorating financial projections, Tesla's valuation multiple has expanded to around 178 times expected earnings.
• Investor narratives focus on robotaxis, AI, and humanoid robots, even with missed targets and uncertainties.
• Q1 deliveries missed forecasts at 358,023 vehicles, with a record 50,000+ unsold vehicles, implying a working capital headwind.
news.Keywords: Tesla, TSLA, free cash flow, valuation, AI, robotaxis, deliveries, inventory, financial projections

news.Title: Why BigBear.ai Stock Sank 11.1% Last Month and Has Kept Falling in April
news.Content: BigBear.ai (NYSE: BBAI) stock got hit with another round of double-digit monthly sell-off in March. The company's share price fell 11.2% in the month, according to data from S&P Global Market Intelligence . Over the same period, the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite declined 5.1% and 4.8%, respectively. ...
news.AI_Summary:
• BigBear.ai (BBAI) stock fell 11.2% in March and continued to decline in April, down roughly 36% year to date.
• The stock's pullback is attributed to broader market volatility related to the Iran war and an uninspiring quarterly report.
• Bearish analyst coverage also pressured the stock, with price target downgrades from H.C. Wainwright and Cantor Fitzgerald.
• BigBear.ai's specialization in defense technologies did not shield it from sell-offs amid broader market risk aversion.
• The company reported Q4 sales of $27.3 million, down roughly 38% year over year, missing analyst estimates.
news.Keywords: BigBear.ai, BBAI, defense stocks, AI, market volatility, quarterly report, analyst ratings, sales decline

news.Title: Why Palantir Technologies Stock Tanked on Wednesday
news.Content: In the face of a broader market recovery today, Palantir Technologies (NASDAQ: PLTR) was under pressure, with the stock falling as much as 7.3%. As of 3:51 p.m. ET, the stock was still down 6.6%. The catalyst that sent ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Palantir Technologies (PLTR) stock fell as much as 7.3% amid a broader market recovery, influenced by a bleak outlook from investor Michael Burry.
• Burry, known for predicting the 2008 crash, has taken significant short positions in Palantir and Nvidia, betting on their prices to fall.
• Burry claims AI startup Anthropic is 'eating Palantir's lunch,' citing Anthropic's ARR growth from $9 billion to $30 billion.
• Palantir's Q4 revenue climbed 70% year over year, with its U.S. commercial segment growing 137%, driving adjusted EPS up 79%.
• Despite Burry's criticism, the author believes Palantir's results and accelerating revenue growth make it a buy.
news.Keywords: Palantir, PLTR, Nvidia, NVDA, Michael Burry, short position, AI, revenue growth, Anthropic

news.Title: Why Is Intel Stock Jumping Today
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Intel ( NASDAQ:INTC ) advanced about 8% on Wednesday, lifted by ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Intel (INTC) advanced about 8% on Wednesday, boosted by a positive analyst assessment and broad strength in technology shares.
• Analyst KC Rajkumar suggested Intel has resolved client wafer supply problems that impacted its Q1 outlook, with unfulfilled demand potentially carrying into future quarters.
• Activity at Intel's 7nm and 14nm nodes appears robust, running at full utilization, with supply shortfall potentially reaching 50% of current demand.
• Lynx Equity raised its price target on Intel to $70 from $65, citing improved near-term execution and longer-term potential.
• The analyst questioned Intel's buyback of its Ireland fab stake, speculating about an external customer's involvement.
news.Keywords: Intel, INTC, wafer supply, analyst assessment, price target, utilization, supply shortfall, AI infrastructure

news.Title: 4檔低價人氣股 法人青睞
news.Content: 台股千金族群熱鬧非凡，部分低價股依然能吸引研究機構目光，面板雙虎8日再度榮膺個股成交量冠、亞軍，法人正面看待轉型契機；記憶體族群中的華邦電（2344）、力積電（6770）股 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 低價股仍受法人青睞，面板雙虎群創、友達成交量居冠、亞軍，法人正面看待轉型契機。
• 記憶體族群華邦電、力積電獲投顧及摩根士丹利青睞，看好股價漲升空間。
• 群創受惠傳統運動賽事需求，品牌客戶提前拉貨，第二季報價溫和上漲，有助去化產能並改善毛利。
• 友達推動雙軸轉型，增加高附加價值產品及擴展垂直場域事業，兆豐投顧給予「逢低買進」投資評等。
• 力積電因記憶體客戶需求續強，晶圓出貨量與單位售價走揚，摩根士丹利看好其前景。
news.Keywords: 低價股,面板雙虎,記憶體,華邦電,力積電,群創,友達,轉型,AI

news.Title: 華邦電、群聯 首季營收同步報喜
news.Content:
AI應用由訓練端快速走向推論端，帶動記憶體與儲存需求同步升溫，華邦電（2344）與群聯（8299）8日同步公布3月與第一季營收成績，雙雙繳出改寫歷史新高的亮眼成績單。

華邦電3 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• AI應用帶動記憶體與儲存需求升溫，華邦電與群聯3月及第一季營收均創歷史新高。
• 華邦電3月營收年增91.49%，第一季營收年增91.34%，連續四個月改寫單月新高。
• 群聯3月營收年增221%，第一季營收年增196%，創單月及同期新高。
• 法人指出，AI發展重新定義記憶體價值，產業轉向重視效能、算力與大容量配置。
• 華邦電2026年資本支出將大增至421億元，用於擴產，Flash與客製化記憶體解決方案為擴產重點。
news.Keywords: AI,記憶體,儲存,華邦電,群聯,營收創新高,資本支出,擴產

news.Title: 美伊停火二周》台股漲點 史上第二
news.Content: 美國與伊朗停火兩周，帶動台股在內的亞股8日強漲。台股方面，集三大法人千億資金全力湧進，尤其外資報復性回補、史上第二大買超1,177億元搶進，鎖定台積電以 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美伊停火兩周，帶動台股在內的亞股8日強漲，台股加權指數終場上漲1,531點至34,761點，創史上第二大漲點。
• 外資報復性回補、史上第二大買超1,177億元搶進，鎖定台積電以史上第七大買超357億元敲單。
• 三大法人8日同步站在買方，合計買超台股1,583億元，自營商買超358.68億元創歷史最多。
• 台股8日長紅K棒突破三角收斂區，看好4月有望挑戰歷史新高35,579點。
• 市場資金將聚焦於強勢股，如矽光子、光通訊、檢測等，台積電法說會概念股有望吸引目光。
news.Keywords: 美伊停火,台股,大漲,外資,買超,台積電,法說會,AI概念股

news.Title: 7檔台股ETF 近一年績效翻倍
news.Content: 美國總統川普宣布美伊戰事停火兩周，台股迎來報復性反彈，回顧川普開啟關稅戰以來近一年，台股加權指數雖然尚未回到35,000點，但已有多檔主動台股ETF率先 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美伊停火兩周，台股迎來報復性反彈，多檔主動台股ETF率先創高。
• 台灣企業掌握全球約90%AI伺服器市占及70%半導體代工市占，具備替代性低的競爭條件。
• 半導體身為AI科技之母，台廠半導體產業鏈扮演AI晶片領頭羊與AI基建軍火庫。
• 預計台積電法說將釋出產業景氣暢旺風向球，半導體行業價格上行趨勢明確。
• AI資本支出與高效能運算需求持續擴張，台股中長期多頭架構未變，科技型ETF仍是市場配置重心。
news.Keywords: 台股ETF,AI,半導體,台積電,法說會,供應鏈,資本支出

news.Title: 高貴不貴 台股40千金達陣
news.Content: 美伊達成停火共識，8日台股多頭火力猛攻，千金股百花齊放，台股40千金達陣，寫歷史新紀錄，早盤宜鼎、AES-KY、金像電 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美伊達成停火共識，8日台股多頭火力猛攻，千金股百花齊放，台股40千金達陣創歷史新紀錄。
• 盤中一度衝上41千金，富邦投顧預期年底台股將有50千金。
• 股王信驊及股后穎崴攜手攻漲停，信驊12,615元創歷史新高。
• 17檔盤中飆漲停，金像電打開漲停收998元，萬潤蓄勢再戰千元。
• 法人提醒，談判結果仍有變數，需留意追高風險及泡沫風險。
news.Keywords: 台股,千金股,股王,股后,信驊,穎崴,漲停,AI,高價股

news.Title: 台股被動ETF旺 前十強犀利
news.Content: 美伊戰爭現轉機，美國總統川普7日宣布，延後兩周對伊朗採取大規模軍事行動，伊朗隨後表示，接受為期兩周的停火協議，國際油價瞬間暴跌17％，台股 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美伊戰爭現轉機，台股加權指數8日大漲1,531點，重返34,000點關卡之上。
• 台股被動ETF績效勁揚，8日績效前十強皆大漲6%以上，較加權指數超額報酬達3成以上。
• 市場資金正以最直接的方式回應AI浪潮的下一場演進，全球資金透過「產品化」布局記憶體產業。
• 台灣記憶體供應鏈在全球AI基礎設施中的關鍵地位，已納入美國記憶體主題ETF。
• AI產業需求展望仍是支撐市場長期趨勢的核心動能，儘管短期有地緣政治干擾，但中長期具結構性投資機會。
news.Keywords: 台股ETF,AI,記憶體,美伊停火,油價,通膨,地緣政治,科技股

news.Title: 00400A掛牌 搶搭台股順風車
news.Content: 美伊宣布停火兩周令避險情緒衰退，油價自高檔回落，亞股普遍飆漲，台股8日大漲1,531點，收34,761點。國泰投信指出，市場現處於短期情緒修復期，後續通膨壓力與風險資產 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美伊宣布停火兩周，避險情緒衰退，油價回落，亞股普遍飆漲，台股8日大漲1,531點，收34,761點。
• 面對變幻莫測的金融情勢，被動布局已難滿足追求超額報酬目標，主動式台股ETF熱度飆升。
• 國泰動能高息ETF（00400A）結合「收益防守」與「動能成長」，篩選優質殖利率標的並強調發展潛力。
• 主動式ETF結合專業團隊選股策略與ETF交易便利性，能在市場波動中動態布局。
• 00400A主打每月收益分配機制，讓投資人分享資本增值並緩解波動焦慮。

news.Content: 美伊為期兩周的停火、原油價格跌破每桶100美元利多下，台股應聲大漲1,531.56點，市場投資新寵主動式台股 ...

• AI相關科技產業及其供應鏈，包括電源管理、高效能運算基礎設施及半導體設備廠務工程，具較高成長潛力。
• 基本面穩健的產業與族群仍具備顯著的布局價值，預期載板、設備、半導體、光通訊、記憶體等族群將持續受惠。

news.Title: 外資：台積季季旺到2027年底
news.Content: 台積電法說前熱度持續加溫，花旗環球、摩根士丹利、高盛及摩根大通證券等攜手凝聚市場焦點，並展現對台積電營運動能高度信心，最吸睛之處在於，據外資估算，台積電單季營收從去 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 外資看好台積電營運動能，預估單季營收將持續成長到2027年底，呈現「季季旺」。
• 儘管智慧手機半導體訂單出現調整，但AI與網通等高效能運算客戶需求強勁，可有效填補產能。
• 預期台積電第二季營收將季增5%～10%，毛利率維持約64%～65%。
• 高盛將台積電目標價上調至2,750元，主要受AI需求主導，營收年增率預估上調至35%（2026年）與30%（2027年）。
• 台積電3奈米與5奈米製程產能利用率滿載，輔以生產效率持續改善，營運動能強勁。
news.Keywords: 台積電,法說會,外資,目標價,AI,營收,毛利率,先進製程,資本支出

news.Title: 美伊停火二周》台股漲點 史上第二
news.Content: 美國與伊朗停火兩周，帶動台股在內的亞股8日強漲。台股方面，集三大法人千億資金全力湧進，尤其外資報復性回補、史上第二大買超1,177億元搶進，鎖定台積電以 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美伊停火兩周，帶動台股在內的亞股8日強漲，台股加權指數終場上漲1,531點至34,761點，創史上第二大漲點。
• 外資報復性回補、史上第二大買超1,177億元搶進，鎖定台積電以史上第七大買超357億元敲單。
• 三大法人8日同步站在買方，合計買超台股1,583億元，自營商買超358.68億元創歷史最多。
• 台股8日長紅K棒突破三角收斂區，看好4月有望挑戰歷史新高35,579點。
• 市場資金將聚焦於強勢股，如矽光子、光通訊、檢測等，台積電法說會概念股有望吸引目光。
news.Keywords: 美伊停火,台股,大漲,外資,買超,台積電,法說會,AI概念股

news.Title: Time to Buy the Dip on Texas Pacific Land Stock?
news.Content: Participate in financial markets long enough, and an investor is apt to hear the saying, "Stocks don't move up in a straight line." Even in the strongest-trending bull markets, hot stocks take breathers. Due to the war in Iran, it's felt as though some energy stocks moved higher in a straight-line fashion. Texas Pacific Land (NYSE: TPL) exuded such ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Texas Pacific Land (TPL) shares have plunged 17.1% in the month ended April 2, extending its retreat from its 52-week high by 18.8%.
• Despite the pullback, shares are up over 54% year to date, but have slipped below their 50-day moving average.
• TPL operates a 'toll road' business model, collecting revenue from oil, water, and pipelines on its West Texas real estate, not directly tied to crude prices.
• The company is pivoting to bolster water desalination capabilities and has AI inroads through energy data hubs.
• Horizon Kinetics, a major investor, believes TPL has more upside ahead, factoring in data center opportunities and renewable energy exposure.
news.Keywords: Texas Pacific Land, TPL, energy, water, pipelines, AI, data centers, toll road model, business pivot

news.Title: Stop Worrying About CapEx and Buy the Dip in Amazon Stock Here
news.Content: Again, the tech giant Amazon (AMZN) has become the center of the larger discussion about whether Big Tech companies might be overreaching in their ambitions to control the artificial intelligence market. The company's plan to invest in capital expenditure worth up to $200 billion by 2026 certainly makes investors uneasy, as they have trouble reconciling such high expenses with free cash flow problems. Nevertheless, this seems to be ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Amazon (AMZN) plans to invest up to $200 billion in capital expenditure by 2026 to build AI infrastructure and secure compute capacity.
• Despite concerns about high expenses and free cash flow, Amazon's capex is seen as positioning for the rapidly growing AI market.
• AWS revenue rose 24% year-over-year to $35.6 billion in Q4 2025, showing strong cloud growth.
• Amazon's net sales grew 14% YoY to $213.4 billion in Q4 2025, with operating income rising 18.3%.
• The company's stock is trading at a P/E ratio of 29.68, with analysts seeing potential upside and strong financials.
news.Keywords: Amazon, AMZN, AI, capital expenditures, AWS, cloud computing, revenue growth, profitability, valuation

news.Title: Apple Turns To Samsung For Foldable Screens
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Apple ( NASDAQ:AAPL ) is reportedly turning to Samsung Display as its sole ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Apple (AAPL) is reportedly turning to Samsung Display as its sole supplier for foldable iPhone screens due to industry readiness.
• Apple has agreed to a 3-year exclusive deal for foldable OLED panels, as other suppliers like BOE and LG Display are not yet meeting Apple's standards.
• Shipments are expected to reach around 3 million units by the end of 2026, lower than earlier projections.
• The foldable iPhone is expected to be priced premium, starting near $2,325, targeting early adopters.
• This exclusivity could run until 2029 or 2030, depending on competitor catch-up.
news.Keywords: Apple, AAPL, foldable iPhone, Samsung Display, supplier, OLED panels, production, pricing, exclusivity

news.Title: 3 Top Agentic AI Stocks Investors Should Be Loading Up on Now
news.Content: Agentic artificial intelligence (AI) is the next major step in the AI revolution. It allows users to develop AI agents that can perform tasks on their behalf with limited human direction. While the most widely used applications of this technology now involve coding, it could easily expand to other areas over the next few years. Getting in front of trends like this can be a profitable pursuit for investors, so now would be ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia (NVDA) leads in parallel processing chips (GPUs) and supports AI workloads with its infrastructure.
• Broadcom (AVGO) targets the market for custom AI chips (ASICs) designed for specific workloads like AI inferencing, offering cost-performance advantages over GPUs.
• Alphabet (GOOGL) launched Gemma 4, a free AI agent model, aiming to lower the barrier to entry for AI agent creation and capture long-term customers for paid services.
• As AI agents become mainstream, they will require more computing hardware from both Nvidia and Broadcom.
• Alphabet's strategy of offering free AI tools could drive adoption and future revenue.
news.Keywords: Nvidia, NVDA, Broadcom, AVGO, Alphabet, GOOGL, AI agents, GPUs, ASICs, TPUs, cloud computing

news.Title: The AI "Capex Trap" Is Wall Street's Biggest Fear Right Now. Here's Why I Think It's Overblown.
news.Content: The most significant challenge with stocks in the artificial intelligence (AI) space involves capital expenditures (capex). Some of the top tech companies plan to spend over $100 billion each on capex in 2026 after investing massive amounts into it last year. Though companies such as Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) or Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOGL) (NASDAQ: GOOG) hold massive liquidity positions, even the largest tech giants are not immune to investors' concerns about the size of their outlays. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The AI market is projected to grow significantly, with Grand View Research forecasting a CAGR of 31% through 2033, reaching nearly $3.5 trillion.
• Amazon (AMZN) plans $200 billion in capex for 2026, following $132 billion in 2025, yet its financial position has improved with revenue up 12% and AWS revenue up 20%.
• Alphabet (GOOGL) plans $175-$185 billion in capex for 2026, up from $91 billion in 2025, with revenue up 18% and Google Cloud revenue up 48%.
• Despite massive capex, both Amazon and Alphabet generated substantial free cash flow and increased book value, suggesting returns on investment.
• The article argues that rising capex spending is not a 'trap' but a buying opportunity if stock prices fall amid these financial improvements.
news.Keywords: AI, capex, Amazon, AMZN, Alphabet, GOOGL, cloud computing, revenue growth, free cash flow, investment opportunity

news.Title: Cathie Wood buys trending tech stocks ahead of U.S.-Iran ceasefire
news.Content: Veteran investor Cathie Wood runs one of the most active funds that regularly trades in crypto-linked equities. A pioneer in the world of crypto investing, she once revealed that her fund was the first public asset manager to gain Bitcoin (BTC) exposure in 2015 when the cryptocurrency wasn't worth even $500. Related: Cathie Wood has brutal response ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Cathie Wood's ARK Invest purchased shares of Tesla (TSLA) and Robinhood Markets (HOOD) on April 7.
• Tesla holds 11,509 Bitcoin worth $827.5 million, having previously accepted Bitcoin payments but abandoned the policy due to environmental concerns.
• Robinhood offers cryptocurrencies and tokenized stocks, and will assist the U.S. Treasury Department with the Trump Accounts program.
• Tesla's stock was up 0.06% at $346.86, and Robinhood's stock was up 5% at $73.13 at press time.
• Wood's purchases occurred on the same day President Trump announced a two-week ceasefire with Iran.
news.Keywords: Cathie Wood, ARK Invest, Tesla, TSLA, Robinhood, HOOD, Bitcoin, cryptocurrency, Iran ceasefire

news.Title: 重電股／清明後台股上攻？　東元新報告
news.Content:
財經中心／廖珪如報導

法人最新報告指出，機電大廠東元（1504）受惠電氣化與資料中心需求成長，Busway與電力設備業務動能延續，但模組化資料中心（MDC）整體解決方案仍處 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 東元受惠電氣化與資料中心需求成長，Busway與電力設備業務動能延續。
• 模組化資料中心（MDC）整體解決方案仍處初期推展階段，短期貢獻有限，目標價下修至65元。
• 預估2026年營收達650.98億元，年增10.2%，主要受惠光纖基礎建設帶動機電需求。
• 2026年毛利率預估25.1%，年增1.3個百分點，但略低於預期，主因工程與系統業務占比提升。
• 展望2027年，隨模組化業務逐步放量，營收預估達773.69億元，年增18.8%，EPS挑戰3.26元。
news.Keywords: 東元,電氣化,資料中心,MDC,營收,毛利率,EPS,目標價下修

news.Title: Everyone's Buying NVIDIA - Here Are 2 Smarter AI Stocks for Q2 2026
news.Content: For years, NVIDIA Corporation NVDA has been a Wall Street darling, with its shares scaling upward due to the relentless demand for its cutting-edge chips and graphics processing units (GPUs). However, despite a strong interest in its products, this year has been subdued for the Jensen Huang-led company. Geopolitical tensions and anxiety over a potential cut in spending on artificial intelligence ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Micron Technology (MU) and Broadcom Inc. (AVGO) are poised to gain from hyperscalers' significant capital spending on AI.
• Micron's high-bandwidth memory (HBM) chips are in high demand due to their ability to handle heavy workloads and improve power efficiency.
• Micron projects fiscal Q3 2026 revenues of $33.5 billion with an expected high gross margin of 81%, reflecting strong financial momentum.
• Broadcom's AI revenues surged 106% year-over-year to $8.4 billion in fiscal Q1 2026, with AI semiconductor revenue expected to reach $10.7 billion in fiscal Q2 2026.
• Both Micron and Broadcom have Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy) ratings, with analysts forecasting significant price target increases.
news.Keywords: Micron, MU, Broadcom, AVGO, AI, hyperscalers, HBM, memory demand, revenue growth, gross margin, price target
