news.Title: 去年「187家公司」賺逾1股本！謝金河看好「2產業」
news.Content:
財經中心／李明融報導

美國總統川普（Donald Trump）同意暫停對伊朗進行更激進的軍事行動，停戰時間則為期2週，市場立刻出現談判的曙光，投資人信心大增，台股今（9日）收盤以34761點作收，上漲1531點，寫 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美國總統川普同意暫停對伊朗更激進軍事行動兩週，市場出現談判曙光，台股9日收盤上漲1531點，台積電漲90元。
• 財信傳媒董事長謝金河指出，台灣去年賺超過一個股本的公司高達187家，顯示企業獲利能力強勁。
• 去年全體上市櫃公司淨利4.53兆元創歷史紀錄，台積電貢獻1.7178兆元，佔38%。
• 去年EPS超過100元的有4家，台積電EPS 66.26元排第9，聯發科66.16元排第10。
• 謝金河點名記憶體及通路商第一季獲利將非常嚇人，預期全年淨利上看5.99兆元。
news.Keywords: 美伊停火,台股,台積電,謝金河,獲利,EPS,記憶體,通路商,AI

news.Title: 不只台積電賺！台股187家EPS超驚嘆 謝金河點名「2產業」獲利大爆發
news.Content: 美國與伊朗達成協議同意停火兩周，國際油價應聲暴跌，激勵亞股全面上揚，帶動台股終場暴漲1531點，站上34761點。財信傳媒董事長謝金河指出，台股去年展現強勁韌性，整體上市櫃公司淨利衝上4 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美伊達成停火協議，國際油價暴跌，激勵亞股全面上揚，台股終場暴漲1531點，站上34761點。
• 財信傳媒董事長謝金河指出，台股去年獲利衝上4.53兆元再創新高，EPS突破10元的企業高達187家。
• EPS逾百元有緯穎、大立光、信驊及川湖等4家，預言記憶體與通路商首季將繳出爆發性成績單。

news.Title: 2 Reasons I Wouldn't Buy the SpaceX IPO With Free Money
news.Content: SpaceX is getting ready to go public, and it could be the biggest IPO in history. After the company filed confidentially to go public last week, Bloomberg reported that it's seeking a valuation of up to $2 trillion, though CEO Elon Musk has pushed back on that report. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue » SpaceX was valued at $1.25 trillion, based on estimates from the board of directors and investment bankers, in February ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SpaceX is seeking a valuation of up to $2 trillion for its IPO.
• The company generated $15 billion-$16 billion in revenue in 2025, with $8 billion in EBITDA.
• Based on a $2 trillion valuation, SpaceX's price-to-sales ratio would be approximately 130.
• This valuation is higher than any S&P 500 stock except Palantir, and more than three times higher than most.
• Elon Musk's leadership carries risk due to overpromising and shifting investor attention.
news.Keywords: SpaceX IPO, valuation risk, price-to-sales, Elon Musk risk, market expectations

news.Title: 台股沒有便宜的股票了！胡采蘋揭迷思：便宜或貴從來就不是看帳面數字
news.Content:
記者李鴻典／台北報導

你有投資股票嗎？財經網美胡采蘋今（8）天表示，便宜或貴從來就不是看帳面數字。2020年台灣戰勝疫情之後，台灣就大步走上了強 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 財經網美胡采蘋表示，便宜或貴從來就不是看帳面數字，台灣只會越來越值錢。
• 台股從2019年後進入大斜率上升軌道，破萬後迅速衝破2萬、3萬，今年挑戰4萬。
• 2019年僅大立光一支千金股，今日首度達成40檔千金股，股王信驊股價已破萬。
• 胡采蘋認為，如果還有便宜的股票，是因為大家都漲了，它為什麼沒漲。
• 股價低的股票買了不漲就是貴，股價高的股票一直漲就是便宜股票。
news.Keywords: 台股,股票,便宜,貴,帳面數字,胡采蘋,AI,千金股,信驊,台灣價值

ASIC設計服務廠智原(3035)今年第一季營運表現承 ...
news.AI_Summary:

• 公司3月營收10.67億元，月增44.72%、年減69.38%；累計第一季營收25.89億元，季減7.8%、年減65%。

news.Content:
今日社群台股最Hot議題

「包子又加熱了」「連群創都能7% 這盤熱到不行啊~~~~~~~~~」「包子套太多人上不去是嗎」「包子想燈？」

「群創準備燈 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 今日社群台股最Hot議題為群創股價表現，網友熱議「包子又加熱了」、「群創準備燈了」。
• 面板大廠群創8日受惠大盤反彈及電子權值股帶動，股價強勢走揚，盤中最高觸及26.2元，漲幅達8.94%。
• 李忠興指出，近期群創籌碼面呈現投信偏多、外資短線進出頻繁，外資前一日賣超逾5萬張，今日隨美伊停火消息，不排除外資短線回補。
• 從技術面觀察，群創穩守季線24.4元之上，上方壓力區落在26.5元至26.8元。
• 李忠興建議操作群創以「高出低進」為主要策略，避免追價或恐慌殺出。
news.Keywords: 群創,面板股,股價,成交量,外資,投信,技術面,壓力區,AI

news.Title: 蘋果自研AI晶片Baltra曝光！韓媒：蘋果直接測試玻璃基板 意欲掌控封裝決策權
news.Content: 韓媒《The Elec》周二 (7 日) 報導指出，蘋果正加速自研 AI 硬體，已開始測試先進的玻璃基板，用於 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 韓媒報導，蘋果正加速自研AI硬體，已開始測試先進的玻璃基板，用於代號「Baltra」的AI伺服器晶片。
• Baltra預計採用台積電3奈米N3E製程，並採用chiplet小晶片架構組合。
• 為增強供應鏈掌控，蘋果直接向三星電機評估採購玻璃基板。
• 晶片通信交由博通開發，三星電機負責提供T-glass玻璃基板，最終由台積電生產封裝。
• 蘋果意圖掌控封裝決策權，透過垂直整合策略，逐步內部化關鍵技術。
news.Keywords: 蘋果,AI晶片,Baltra,玻璃基板,台積電,三星電機,博通,封裝,供應鏈,垂直整合

news.Title: 超車0050！「不配息0050」009816爆近30萬張成交巨量奪台股第一
news.Content: 台股今（8）日強勢反彈，ETF同步爆出大量，其中「不配息0050」凱基台灣TOP50（009816）盤中成交量衝上近30萬張 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股今日強勢反彈，ETF同步爆出大量，凱基台灣TOP50（009816）盤中成交量衝上近30萬張，奪台股及ETF成交量冠軍。
• 009816主打「股息自動再投入」機制，將股利直接再投資於成分股，不採配息方式，吸引長期投資資金。
• 009816追蹤「臺灣TOP 50指數」，前十大持股以電子權值股為主，台積電權重高達42.2%。
• 法人表示，AI需求持續熱絡，CSP業者積極導入自研ASIC晶片，預計下半年成為另一波成長動能。
• 儘管短期需留意地緣政治與通膨變數，但中長期基本面依然穩健。
news.Keywords: 台股ETF,009816,0050,成交量,冠軍,AI,CSP,ASIC,台積電,基本面

news.Title: 187家賺逾1股本！ 謝金河點名「2產業」：獲利會很嚇人
news.Content: 去年台股展現驚人韌性，全體上市櫃公司淨利衝上4.53兆元。雖然台積電以1.7兆元獲利穩坐護國神山，但數據顯示台灣已非「一個人的武林」，去年高達187家公司賺超過一個股本，從AI供應鏈到觀光旅遊業 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 去年台股展現驚人韌性，全體上市櫃公司淨利衝上4.53兆元再創新高，去年EPS突破10元的企業高達187家。
• EPS逾百元有緯穎、大立光、信驊及川湖等4家，謝金河預言，記憶體與通路商首季將繳出爆發性成績單。
• 台積電去年獲利1.7兆元，佔上市櫃公司淨利38%，扮演護國神山角色。
• 謝金河指出，台灣企業獲利能力超強，數字令人驚嘆。
• 預期記憶體及通路商第一季獲利將非常嚇人，全年淨利上看5.99兆元，將是支撐台股的重要底氣。
news.Keywords: 台股,獲利,EPS,台積電,記憶體,通路商,AI,謝金河

news.Title: 股王信驊大漲1145元攻漲停12615元　再創台股新紀錄
news.Content: （中央社記者鍾榮峰台北2026年04月8日電）信驊 (5274) 3月和第1 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 信驊3月和第1季自結合併營收同創新高，加上美伊停火協議，帶動台股飆漲逾1300點。
• 信驊今天早盤衝上漲停12615元，大漲1145元，超越3月18日高點，再創新天價。
• 個股股價和上漲金額續創台股新紀錄。
• 信驊持續受到投信法人買盤挹注，從3月6日到4月7日連續加碼。
• 信驊3月營收12.35億元，月增22.2%，年增63.63%；累計第1季營收31.47億元，季增28.8%，年增52.38%，均創單月和單季新高。
news.Keywords: 信驊,營收,創新高,AI,伺服器,BMC,投信,台股,漲停

news.Title: 高盛、大摩喊買！ 台積電目標價衝2750元 專家揭「瘋狂上修關鍵」
news.Content: 當川普釋出與伊朗和平協議接近達成的訊號，原油價格回吐，地緣風險暫歇後，市場目光重新聚焦台積電。儘管消費性電子疲軟，高盛與大摩仍因AI需求爆發調升其長期營運展望，產業專家沈萬鈞表示，台積電成長主軸已由AI接手，毛利率與 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 當川普釋出與伊朗和平協議接近達成的訊號，原油價格回吐，地緣風險暫歇後，市場目光重新聚焦台積電。
• 高盛與摩根士丹利因AI需求爆發調升台積電長期營運展望，認為成長主軸已由AI接手，毛利率與資本支出將迎來結構性上揚。
• 儘管消費性電子疲軟，但AI GPU、AI ASIC及傳統伺服器CPU需求強勁，已迅速填補產能缺口。
• 高盛預期下一代AI加速器將推動製程從N5遷移至N3，並進一步往N2推進，先進製程供給到2027年後仍將維持緊張。
• 高盛將台積電12個月目標價上修至2750元並維持買進評等，摩根士丹利維持「加碼」評等，目標價2288元。
news.Keywords: 台積電,AI,毛利率,資本支出,先進製程,高盛,摩根士丹利,目標價,營收,AI加速器

news.Title: 台積電法說會前美系外資調高目標價至2750元，重申「買進」
news.Content: 【財訊快報／記者劉居全報導】趕在台積電(2330)下週召開法說會前，美系外資在最新出爐的報告中調高目標價，由原先預估的2600元調 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台積電下週召開法說會前，美系外資最新報告調高目標價至2750元，重申「買進」評等。
• 另一家美系外資重申「加碼」評等，目標價2288元。
• 美系外資看好台積電受惠於人工智慧將帶動多年成長，以及更高的結構性毛利率。

news.Title: 大和喊進南亞科「目標價292」 專家直指關鍵：定價模型徹底改變
news.Content: 大和證券近期將南亞科目標價由245元上調至292元，具多年市場經驗的基金經理人沈萬鈞直指核心關鍵，若獲利不再是短線暴漲後隨即反轉，而是能維持長時間的高位，南亞科的定價模型將徹底改變，從傳統循環股轉向戰略資源供應 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 大和證券將南亞科目標價由245元上調至292元，認為獲利不再是短線暴漲後隨即反轉，而是能維持長時間高位。
• 南亞科3月合併營收181.70億元，第一季累計營收490.87億元，獲利優於預期。
• 第二季conventional DRAM合約價預估季增58%至63%，主因供應商將產能轉向HBM及伺服器應用。
• AI優化改善單位成本與效率，反而會釋放被壓抑的需求，導致總量擴張。
• 北美CSP正與供應商洽談長約，記憶體已成為AI基礎設施中「不能斷料的戰略資源」。
news.Keywords: 南亞科,大和證券,目標價,DRAM,報價,AI,伺服器,長約,獲利,記憶體

news.Title: The Crowd Is Dumping Iren. Here's Why I'd Be Buying It Down 54%.
news.Content: Not that long ago, Iren (NASDAQ: IREN) enjoyed a monumental bull run, soaring from $5 to $76 in less than a year. That euphoric momentum has been depleted. The stock has crashed by 54% from its all-time high, but the long-term picture is stronger than ever. Here's why Iren looks like a buy ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Iren's stock has crashed 54% from its all-time high, with an at-the-market equity program causing skepticism.
• The company has a $11 billion market cap, and the equity program could dilute shares by half.
• Iren signed a landmark five-year $9.7 billion deal with Microsoft for AI data center capacity.

news.Content:

news.Title: 【盤前焦點】美股、台指期夜盤翻紅　台股拚續強
news.Content: （中央社記者江明晏台北2026年04月8日電）對伊朗通牒截止前，美國總統川普表示開放荷莫茲海峽換暫停攻擊2週，美股翻紅多收高，國際油價收盤互有漲跌；台指期夜盤震 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 對伊朗通牒截止前，美國總統川普表示開放荷姆茲海峽換暫停攻擊2週，美股翻紅多收高。
• 國際油價收盤互有漲跌，台指期夜盤震盪，終場漲318點，台積電期貨盤後也收紅。
• 投顧認為有助台股表現，市場預期美伊協商仍有空間，不至於有供給中斷的極端風險。
• 然而，最終協議達成前，不確定性仍將使油市維持高波動，持續牽動通膨與利率。
• 市場解讀外交有降溫空間，資金向具備AI催化劑的科技龍頭集中，有助台股表現。

news.Title: 1分鐘讀財經》台積電法說倒數 外資曝6大必考題！這次「回檔」成致富跳板
news.Content: 小編今天（8）日精選5件國內外重要財經大事。全球晶圓代工龍頭台積電16日召開法說會，外資大型研究機構在槍林彈雨中提問上膛，聚焦台積電2奈米、長線擴產計畫等六大核心議題，同 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台積電16日召開法說會，外資聚焦2奈米、長線擴產計畫等六大核心議題，並把握回檔機會調升目標價。
• 摩根士丹利、花旗環球、摩根大通證券分別將台積電股價預期升至2,288元、2,800元與2,400元。
• 市場最關注AI需求是否持續升溫，以及對台積電營收貢獻是否擴大；先進製程與封裝需求強勁，關注資本支出展望。
• 預期台積電基調將延續正向，對AI加速器需求將展現更樂觀態度，2027～2028年產能擴增將更積極。
• 台積電2奈米製程推進進度、客戶導入情況及其對獲利與接單動能的挹注，亦是法說會重要觀察指標。
news.Keywords: 台積電,法說會,外資,目標價,AI,2奈米,先進製程,封裝,資本支出,營收

news.Title: 創意3月營收月增15%；Q1寫次高/年增達63%
news.AI_Summary:
• 創意3月合併營收38.60億元，月增15%、年增33%，創同期新高。
• 第一季合併營收114.48億元，季減7.68%、年增63%，創單季歷史次高。
• 公司拿下Google CPU大單，下一代CPU訂單也順利到手，今年CPU產能比去年更多。

• ADAS業務中國、歐洲客戶已開始量產，北美客戶專案也在進行中，對今明兩年展望樂觀。

news.Title: The AI Supercycle Isn't Over -- It Just Moved. 5 Growth Stocks Riding the Next Wave.
news.Content: Despite the stock market's rotation out of tech stocks this year, the artificial intelligence (AI) supercycle is far from over. However, it has shifted, which is going to benefit a new basket of AI stocks . The AI infrastructure boom started with the need for raw computing power to train large language models (LLMs). This was a race that helped line the pockets of Nvidia with massive ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The AI supercycle is shifting towards networking, inference, and agentic AI.
• Broadcom is a leader in Ethernet switches and data center networking components.
• Broadcom is also a leader in ASIC technology for the inference market.
• Alphabet is partnering with Broadcom on advanced AI ASICs (TPUs), offering a 44% lower total cost of ownership than Nvidia servers.
• Arista Networks provides networking platforms and benefits from growing AI chip clusters.
news.Keywords: AI supercycle, networking, inference, ASIC technology, data center infrastructure

news.Title: Apple encounters serious problems with foldable iPhone
news.Content: Apple's long-anticipated entry into the foldable smartphone market has run into trouble before the product ever reached a store shelf. The company has experienced setbacks in the engineering test phase of its first foldable iPhone that could delay mass production and its planned shipment schedule, Nikkei Asia reported on April 6, citing multiple sources briefed on the matter. Reuters, which also carried the story, said it could not independently verify the report. Apple did not respond to TheStreet's request for comment. Apple shares ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Apple's foldable iPhone entry faces engineering test phase setbacks, potentially delaying mass production and shipment.
• Nikkei Asia reported that April is a critical stage for engineering verification, with potential delays extending by months.
• Apple planned to launch 7 to 8 million foldable units, less than 10% of total 2026 iPhone production.
• Engineering challenges include hinge reliability, display durability, and component integration into a thin form factor.
• A delay could impact Apple's marketing strategy and give rivals like Samsung more time to capture market share.
news.Keywords: foldable iPhone, engineering challenges, production delay, supply chain, market competition

news.Title: Nvidia's Artificial Intelligence (AI) Chips Still Need Memory. Here's Why the Micron Sell-Off Has Gone Too Far.
news.Content: In late March, Alphabet unveiled a new software product called TurboQuant. At a high level, TurboQuant dramatically compresses memory footprints in large language models during inference . It didn't take long for headlines to circulate and cause shares of Micron Technology (NASDAQ: MU) to plunge. In large part, the sell-off was tied to Micron's relationship with Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) since its high-bandwidth memory (HBM) solutions help power Nvidia's ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Alphabet's TurboQuant software compresses memory footprints in large language models, causing a sell-off in memory stocks like Micron.
• Nvidia's high-bandwidth memory (HBM) solutions power its GPUs, making Micron a key supplier.
• The article argues that TurboQuant does not eliminate the need for Micron's memory solutions.
• Nvidia's latest chip architectures (Blackwell, Vera Rubin) are designed with larger HBM stacks.
• Nvidia cannot easily switch suppliers due to extensive testing and integration requirements.
news.Keywords: TurboQuant, memory demand, HBM, GPU integration, supply chain risk

news.Title: 台股下跌你不要怕！法人丟出災難投資法　它把握撿鑽石機會
news.Content:
財經中心／余國棟報導

2026年第一季末，台股遭受「外部地緣政治」與「內部清明連假」雙重干擾，受伊朗與以色列軍事緊張影響，避險情緒推升油金價格，美股科技股承壓，導致台股同步回檔 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股遭受「外部地緣政治」與「內部清明連假」雙重干擾後，受伊朗與以色列軍事緊張影響，避險情緒推升油金價格，美股科技股承壓，導致台股同步回檔。
• 操作上需嚴防非理性拋售，國泰金控總經理李長庚提出「災難投資法」，認為戰爭持續時可視為進場機會點。
• 主動國泰動能高息ETF（00400A）經理人梁恩溢表示，市場恐慌帶來的股價回檔，對剛握有充足現金的主動式基金而言，是「彎腰撿鑽石」的布局良機。
• 00400A具備「成長攻擊、收益防守」雙主流配置策略，並搭配月配息機制，成分股中的「高息股」可扮演關鍵緩衝角色。
• 建議分批佈局，逢回優先聚焦具備高護城河、高毛利與高現金流的AI業績成長股。
news.Keywords: 台股,地緣政治,油價,美股,科技股,國泰金,災難投資法,00400A,ETF,AI,高息股,護城河

• 創意3月合併營收38.60億元，月增15.16％、年增33.48％，創同期最佳；第一季合併營收114.48億元，年增62.99%。

• 法人看好智原在先進製程與高效能運算領域的布局，可望受惠於18A平台成熟與生態系擴張。
news.Keywords: ASIC,創意,智原,巨有,營收,AI,台積電,CoWoS,CSP,先進製程

news.Title: 南亞科Q1獲利唱旺 外資青睞
news.Content: 記憶體一哥南亞科（2408）望到外資春風。大和資本證券指出，隨DRAM報價走揚，南亞科第一季獲利將超越預期，DDR4今年全年需求都極為強勁，將 ...
news.AI_Summary:

• 認為獲利不再是短線暴漲後隨即反轉，而是能維持長時間高位，南亞科定價模型將徹底改變，轉向戰略資源供應者。
• 第二季conventional DRAM合約價預估季增58%至63%，主因供應商將產能轉向HBM及伺服器應用。
• AI優化改善單位成本與效率，反而會釋放被壓抑的需求，導致總量擴張。
• 南亞科已與包含SanDisk、Solidigm在內多家客戶簽署多年期DRAM長約，合約總額約達25億美元。
news.Keywords: 南亞科,外資,目標價,DRAM,報價,AI,伺服器,長約,獲利,記憶體

news.Title: 台股強勢登月 重返33K
news.Content: 台股清明連假後首日交易，戰事紛擾暫擺一邊。台積電強勢回歸月線，開盤直接跳空至1,850元大漲40元，終場收在1,850元勁揚50元，權值股台達電等齊助攻，加權指數 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股清明連假後首日交易，台積電強勢回歸月線，開盤跳空至1,850元大漲40元。
• 加權指數7日跳空開高走高，大漲657點收33,229點，收復33K並站回月線及所有均線。
• 凱基投顧、群益投顧認為，台股需觀察美伊停火談判明朗，若能重啟運輸，可避免油價續漲、通膨疑慮。
• 基本面利多齊發，包括去年獲利股息雙創高、台積電法說會可望釋利多、美國科技股財報上修可期。

news.Content: 台股清明連假後首日交易，戰事紛擾暫擺一邊。台積電強勢回歸月線，開盤直接跳空至1,850元大漲40元，終場收在1,850元勁揚50元，權值股台達電等齊助攻，加權指數 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股清明連假後首日交易，台積電強勢回歸月線，開盤跳空至1,850元大漲40元。
• 加權指數7日跳空開高走高，大漲657點收33,229點，收復33K並站回月線及所有均線。
• 凱基投顧、群益投顧認為，台股需觀察美伊停火談判明朗，若能重啟運輸，可避免油價續漲、通膨疑慮。
• 基本面利多齊發，包括去年獲利股息雙創高、台積電法說會可望釋利多、美國科技股財報上修可期。

news.Title: 權證市場焦點－台積電 急單需求增
news.Content: 隨晶圓代工龍頭台積電（2330）16日法說會即將召開，市場提前押寶買盤也 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 隨晶圓代工龍頭台積電16日法說會召開，市場提前押寶買盤踴躍，台積電股價7日領軍大漲2.76%，終場收1,860元。
• 法人分析，台積電2奈米製程報價將突破3萬美元，AI需求急迫，訂單能見度至2028年。
• 預估台積電第一季毛利率有望攀升至66.8%，反映N3產能緊張、先進製程利用率高及急單需求增加。
• 預期今年及2027年營收年增幅都將超過3成，N3營收今年成長至2倍，占總體營收30%以上。
• 上修今年及2027年每股稅後純益預估值至95.5元及120.4元。
news.Keywords: 台積電,法說會,晶圓代工,2奈米,AI,毛利率,N3,營收,EPS,先進製程

news.Title: 台積法說下周登場 外資揭六大必考題
news.Content: 全球晶圓代工龍頭台積電16日召開法說會，外資大型研究機構在槍林彈雨中提問上膛，聚焦台積電2奈米、長線擴產計畫等六大核心議題，同時，外資亦把握回 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台積電16日召開法說會，外資聚焦2奈米、長線擴產計畫等六大核心議題，並把握回檔機會調升目標價。
• 摩根士丹利、花旗環球、摩根大通證券分別將台積電股價預期升至2,288元、2,800元與2,400元。
• 市場最關注AI需求是否持續升溫，以及對台積電營收貢獻是否擴大；先進製程與封裝需求強勁，關注資本支出展望。
• 摩根大通預期台積電法說會基調將延續正向，對AI加速器需求將展現更樂觀態度，2027～2028年產能擴增將更積極。
• 摩根士丹利認為，台積電2027、2028年資本支出上看650與700億美元，產能擴張將確保領導地位。

news.Title: Why Shares of Car-Rental Outfit Avis Are Driving Higher Today
news.Content: Following through on bullishness that first materialized late last month , shares of Avis Budget Group (NASDAQ: CAR) are up again today. Indeed, thanks to today's 15.7% gain (as of 3:40 p.m. ET), the stock's up 150% from its mid-March low, reaching a new 52-week high in the process. You just can't count on this rally continuing much longer than it already has enough to dive into it now. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Avis Budget Group (CAR) shares are up 150% from their mid-March low, reaching a new 52-week high.
• The stock is considered a short-squeeze candidate, with 23% of outstanding shares and 48% of float sold short.
• Short sellers face widening unrealized losses as the stock gains.
• The situation is largely psychological, with unpredictable outcomes for both short sellers and squeeze proponents.

news.Keywords: short squeeze, Avis stock, trading psychology, market volatility, risk management

news.Title: Dimon Says AI Capital Spending Will Hit $725 Billion in 2026. Here Are the Sectors That Will Win and the Ones That Will Be Left Behind
news.Content: The artificial intelligence ( AI ) market has expanded rapidly over the past decade, driven by the arrival of more sophisticated generative AI applications, chatbots, and services. That expansion drove many AI stocks to all-time highs. Still, some of those market darlings fizzled out this year as inflation, geopolitical conflicts, and other macro headwinds pushed investors toward more conservative investments. But over the long term, the AI market ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Hyperscalers like Microsoft, Amazon, and Alphabet will increase annual AI-driven capital spending from $450 billion (2025) to $725 billion (2026).
• The biggest beneficiaries are AI infrastructure stocks, including data center REITs like Equinix and Digital Realty.
• Leading AI chipmakers like Nvidia and Broadcom, and foundries like TSMC, will also profit.
• Companies supplying optical equipment, such as Lumentum and Corning, will benefit from data center connection upgrades.
• Older and smaller software companies like Salesforce and ServiceNow may struggle against newer AI challengers.
news.Keywords: AI capital spending, data center REITs, AI infrastructure, chipmakers, software competition

news.Title: Why Intel Stock Is Gaining Today
news.Content: Intel (NASDAQ: INTC) stock is moving higher Tuesday despite bearish pressures for the broader market. The semiconductor company's share price was up 2.2% as of 3:15 p.m. ET. Meanwhile, the S&P 500 had fallen 0.7%, and the Nasdaq Composite was off 1%. The stock had been up as much as 4.9% earlier in the day. ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Intel stock is up 2.2% despite broader market declines, driven by a new partnership with SpaceX, Tesla, and xAI.
• Intel will join Elon Musk's Terafab project to advance chip fabrication for AI and robotics.
• The partnership is a significant win for Intel's turnaround efforts and its manufacturing business.
• Terafab aims to produce advanced chip designs and up to a terawatt of compute power annually.
• The collaboration could be a substantial boost for Intel's foundry services, facing competition from TSMC.
news.Keywords: Intel stock, Terafab project, AI partnership, semiconductor manufacturing, foundry services

news.Title: The AI Supercycle Just Entered Phase 2. Most Investors Aren't Ready.
news.Content: The first phase of the artificial intelligence (AI) supercycle was all about chips. It didn't take long for the whole market to catch on when Nvidia became a household name and data center stocks surged to crazy valuations. That trade happened in broad daylight. Phase 2 is quieter. It's happening in server rooms you'll never visit, in underground fiber conduits across rural Illinois, and in the test labs that ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The AI supercycle is entering Phase 2, focusing on networking, inference, and agentic AI.
• Keysight Technologies reported Q1 fiscal 2026 revenue of $1.6 billion (up 23% YoY) and record orders of $1.65 billion.
• Wireline revenue surpassed wireless revenue, driven by demand for 800G and 1.6T optical transceiver validation.
• Keysight's full-year revenue growth is guided 'just above 20%', with software and services accounting for 40% of revenue.
• Calix builds an AI cloud and appliance-based platform for rural broadband providers, benefiting from federal BEAD program funding.
news.Keywords: AI supercycle phase 2, optical networking, AI infrastructure, broadband deployment, rural connectivity

news.Title: The AI Supercycle Just Entered Phase 2. Most Investors Aren't Ready.
news.Content: The first phase of the artificial intelligence (AI) supercycle was all about chips. It didn't take long for the whole market to catch on when Nvidia became a household name and data center stocks surged to crazy valuations. That trade happened in broad daylight. Phase 2 is quieter. It's happening in server rooms you'll never visit, in underground fiber conduits across rural Illinois, and in the test labs that ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The AI supercycle is entering Phase 2, focusing on networking, inference, and agentic AI.
• Keysight Technologies reported Q1 fiscal 2026 revenue of $1.6 billion (up 23% YoY) and record orders of $1.65 billion.
• Wireline revenue surpassed wireless revenue, driven by demand for 800G and 1.6T optical transceiver validation.
• Keysight's full-year revenue growth is guided 'just above 20%', with software and services accounting for 40% of revenue.
• Calix builds an AI cloud and appliance-based platform for rural broadband providers, benefiting from federal BEAD program funding.
news.Keywords: AI supercycle phase 2, optical networking, AI infrastructure, broadband deployment, rural connectivity

Micron’s Critical AI Role Micron is a world leader in memory and storage ...

news.Title: Nvidia Stock Just Presented Investors With a Once-in-a-Decade Buying Opportunity
news.Content: The S&P 500 index has plunged almost 9% from its January all-time high amid ongoing geopolitical tensions in the Middle East. With oil prices soaring, Wall Street is worried about a slowdown in the U.S. economy and in corporate earnings. Some individual tech stocks have declined even more sharply than the S&P 500, including Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) which is currently down 20% from its record high. While the company could be impacted by economic uncertainty in the short term, demand for ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia stock is down 20% from its record high, presenting a potential buying opportunity.
• The company's forward P/E ratio is cheaper than the S&P 500 for the first time in 13 years.
• Nvidia's new Vera Rubin platform aims to reduce inference token costs by 90% and GPU usage by 75%.
• Wall Street expects Nvidia's fiscal 2027 revenue to reach nearly $370 billion, a 71% increase.
• Fiscal 2027 adjusted EPS is expected to soar 74% to $8.29 per share.
news.Keywords: buying opportunity, stock valuation, inference costs, revenue acceleration, EPS growth

news.Title: Dear Taiwan Semi Stock Fans, Mark Your Calendars for April 16
news.Content: The world’s most important chipmaker is set to announce its earnings on April 16. Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company (TSM) manufactures chips for companies like Nvidia (NVDA) and Apple (AAPL), in addition to hyperscalers investing heavily in AI. For years, the company’s core business revolved around iPhones, tablets, and PCs. Since the emergence of AI, things have changed, and people are only now starting to see how much of an impact AI is having on ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company (TSMC) is set to announce earnings on April 16.
• TSMC manufactures chips for Nvidia, Apple, and hyperscalers investing heavily in AI.
• The company's AI business uses cutting-edge nodes (5nm, 3nm) and advanced packaging, yielding high margins.
• The legacy business serving smartphones and PCs uses older nodes (28nm, 16nm).
• There's potential for TSMC to divert capacity from legacy nodes to AI chip manufacturing.
news.Keywords: TSMC earnings, AI chips, semiconductor manufacturing, advanced nodes, capacity allocation

news.Title: Why Apple Stock Is Sinking Today
news.Content: Apple (NASDAQ: AAPL) stock is moving lower in Tuesday's trading amid two main bearish catalysts. The company's share price was down 2.9% as of 2:35 p.m. ET. At the same point in the daily session, the S&P 500 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Apple shares were down 2.9% due to geopolitical risks and a UBS note on App Store growth.
• UBS projects 7% year-over-year growth for the App Store in Q1, with U.S. market growth being flat.
• UBS maintained a neutral rating on Apple stock with a $280 price target.
• Concerns exist about slowing services growth impacting valuation multiples.
• Apple will report fiscal Q2 results on April 30.
news.Keywords: Apple stock, geopolitical risk, App Store growth, services revenue, UBS rating

news.Title: Time to Buy the Dip on Waste Management Stock?
news.Content: When scouring the universe of buy-on-the-dip candidates, of which there are plenty these days, investors often hone in on growth stocks, including some artificial intelligence (AI) names, in the hopes of finding "good deals." It's an understandable approach. Plenty of famed AI stocks have retreated materially since the start of 2026, confirming that the realm of "hot" stocks that have dipped is growing. On the other hand, dip buyers can rejoice in knowing that there's something for everyone in the pullback garden. There are viable options ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Waste Management (WM) stock has retreated 3.5% in the past month, but remains a strong performer.
• The company has a 10-year revenue CAGR of 21.3% and has consistently raised its dividend for 23 straight years.
• WM posted $25.2 billion in revenue last year and has reduced its shares outstanding through buybacks.
• The company has $23.4 billion in debt but aims to improve its leverage ratio to 2.5x-3x this year.
• WM unveiled a new $3 billion share repurchase program and boosted its quarterly dividend.
news.Keywords: buy the dip, stock performance, dividend growth, share repurchase, debt management

news.Title: Why Arm Holdings Stock Skyrocketed 18% in March
news.Content: Shares of Arm Holdings (NASDAQ: ARM) bounded higher in March, gaining as much as 18.7%, according to data supplied by S&P Global Market Intelligence . The catalyst that sent the semiconductor specialist higher was the development of Arm's very first in-house production artificial intelligence (AI) chip and the ensuing reaction ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Arm Holdings stock gained 18.7% in March, driven by the development of its first in-house AI chip, the Arm AGI CPU.
• The Arm AGI CPU is designed for AI inference in data centers, offering twice the performance-per-watt of x86 racks.
• CEO Rene Haas estimates Arm could generate $25 billion in annual revenue and $9 EPS by 2031, with $15 billion from the AGI CPU.
• Guggenheim maintained a Buy rating and raised its price target to $240, representing potential 61% upside.
• The stock is trading at 49 times next year's expected sales, but less than 17 times estimated 2031 earnings.
news.Keywords: AI chip development, Arm AGI CPU, performance-per-watt, revenue projection, stock valuation

news.Title: The Big Risk With Taiwan Semiconductor Stock That No One Wants to Talk About
news.Content: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing (NYSE: TSM) plays a crucial role in the tech sector, as it is the go-to chip manufacturer for many companies. Its low-cost production makes it an efficient business, and it generates strong margins. It has also been experiencing terrific growth as a result of artificial ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing (TSM) is a crucial chip manufacturer with strong growth driven by AI spending.
• The stock has risen over 130% in the past 12 months, with a market valuation around $1.8 trillion.
• A significant risk is TSM's potential vulnerability to the Chinese government due to geopolitical tensions regarding Taiwan.
• Reunification with China could give Beijing more power in the tech world and influence TSM's operations.
• Investors should consider the geopolitical uncertainty despite TSM's solid financials and growth prospects.
news.Keywords: TSMC risk, geopolitical uncertainty, China relations, chip manufacturing, AI stock

news.Title: Why Nio Stock Accelerated 23.8% Higher in March
news.Content: After a bumpy start to 2026, Nio (NYSE: NIO) stock has been driving steadily higher over the past two months. While shares of the electric car manufacturer dipped 7.8% in January, they recovered in February, climbing 3.6%, and accelerated further last month as investors celebrated the company's reporting of strong fourth-quarter ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nio (NIO) stock rose 23.8% in March, driven by strong Q4 2025 financial results.
• Q4 revenue reached 34.65 billion renminbi ($4.95 billion), a 75.9% year-over-year increase.
• Gross profit margin improved to 17.5%, and net income turned positive at 282.7 million renminbi.
• Nio projects Q1 2026 revenue growth of 103.4% to 109.2% year-over-year.
• Analysts from Bank of America and HSBC raised their price targets and maintained bullish outlooks.
news.Keywords: Nio stock performance, Q4 earnings, revenue growth, gross margin, analyst outlook

news.Title: SHOP Rides on Robust Merchant Solutions Revenues: More Upside Ahead?
news.Content: Shopify ’s SHOP Merchant Solutions revenues are benefiting from the company’s AI push. It hosts a data trove, thanks to an expanding merchant base and a growing number of transactions. This huge amount of data is helping Shopify offer better shopping experiences to merchants and, eventually, their customers. The company is leveraging agentic commerce to boost shopper experience, beginning with product ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Shopify's (SHOP) Merchant Solutions revenues are benefiting from its AI push and expanding merchant base.
• Merchant Solutions revenues jumped 35% year-over-year in Q4 2025 to $2.9 billion.
• Gross Merchandise Volume (GMV) reached $123.8 billion, a 38% increase.
• Shopify expects low 30s revenue growth in Q1 2026, led by Merchant Solutions and international expansion.
• Shopify's AI partnership with Google establishes a standard for AI-driven commerce, with integrations across ChatGPT, Google AI Mode/Gemini, and Microsoft Copilot.
news.Keywords: Merchant Solutions, AI push, GMV growth, international expansion, AI commerce partnership

news.Title: ASML Slides as U.S. Targets China Sales
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Shares of ASML Holding ( NASDAQ:ASML ) fell 3.94% in Amsterdam on Tuesday, ...
news.AI_Summary:
• ASML Holding shares fell 3.94% following the introduction of the MATCH Act, which could further restrict its access to China.
• The bill aims to block sales and servicing of ASML's deep ultraviolet immersion lithography tools to major Chinese chipmakers.
• Analysts estimate the financial hit could range from a low single-digit percentage impact on sales to a 10% reduction in EPS.
• ASML forecasts China to represent 20% of total revenue in 2026, down from roughly 30% in 2025.
• The legislation directs the U.S. to push allies to adopt similar tighter measures.
news.Keywords: ASML stock, China sales restriction, lithography tools, export controls, trade legislation

news.Title: 熱門股／PCB缺料　帶飛台股6雄
news.Content:
財經中心／廖珪如報導

隨AI伺服器架構持續升級，並帶動雲端服務供應商（CSP）自研晶片加速量產，P ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 隨AI伺服器架構升級，帶動CSP自研晶片加速量產，PCB上游關鍵原材料供需缺口擴大。
• 法人指出，高階銅箔、玻纖布與樹脂等材料供不應求，AI需求推升缺料情況難緩解，預期再度啟動漲價循環。
• 日本化工龍頭三菱瓦斯化學4月起上調電子材料價格30%，反映上游材料供應緊張與成本壓力。
• 台股供應鏈方面，玻纖布與銅箔基板相關族群可望受惠，包括台玻、富喬、建榮、德宏、凱崴及尖點等。
• 隨AI與高效能運算需求擴張，相關廠商營運動能備受關注。
news.Keywords: AI,伺服器,CSP,PCB,銅箔基板,玻纖布,樹脂,缺料,漲價,三菱瓦斯化學,台玻,富喬

news.Title: 5-star analyst makes a bold call on Micron stock
news.Content: Micron’s ( MU ) long-term AI-powered bull case just got a massive new endorsement from a five-star analyst. KeyBlanc’s John Vinh reiterated a Buy rating on the memory chipmaker, sticking with his lofty $600 price target. Based on its current stock price, that implies over a 60% upside , a massive bump for a stock that has mostly been range-bound over the past month . Micron and other memory stocks took hits on the back of the Google TurboQuant story, which suggested that AI systems might need far less memory per task than previously estimated. However, over the past ...
news.AI_Summary:
• KeyBanc analyst John Vinh reiterated a Buy rating on Micron (MU) with a $600 price target, implying over 60% upside.
• Micron and other memory stocks took hits due to Google's TurboQuant story, but have since recovered 18% in a week.
• The recovery is attributed to renewed conviction on memory tightness and rising DRAM/NAND prices.
• Vinh forecasts DRAM and NAND prices to jump another 30% to 50% in Q2.
• Long-term agreements with cloud giants include pricing floors and upfront payments, reducing choppiness.
news.Keywords: Micron stock, analyst call, price target, memory market, DRAM/NAND prices

news.Title: Anthropic launches cybersecurity partnership with Nvidia, Microsoft, other tech giants after latest AI model finds 'thousands' of previously unknown bugs
news.Content: Anthropic ( ANTH.PVT ) on Tuesday announced a cybersecurity partnership with companies including Amazon ( AMZN ), Apple ( AAPL ), and Microsoft ( MSFT ) that it said will help defend against the rise of AI-powered cyberattacks. Called Project Glasswing, the initiative relies on Anthropic’s new Claude Mythos Preview, a frontier model that the company said will only be made available to a handful of organizations. A group of roughly 40 other ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Anthropic launched Project Glasswing, a cybersecurity partnership with Amazon, Apple, Microsoft, and others.
• The initiative uses Anthropic's Claude Mythos Preview model to defend against AI-powered cyberattacks.
• Claude Mythos Preview has identified thousands of zero-day vulnerabilities, including critical ones.
• The model has detected flaws in major operating systems and web browsers, including old software bugs.
• Anthropic is committing $100 million in usage credits and $4 million in donations to open-source cybersecurity organizations.
news.Keywords: cybersecurity partnership, AI security, Claude Mythos Preview, zero-day vulnerabilities, open-source donation

news.Content: The quantum computing space is beginning to show early signs of a capital markets inflection, as fresh funding rounds and a gradually reopening IPO pipeline point to improving investor appetite for deep-tech plays. news.Title: Billionaires Are Loading Up on This Genius Stock That's Up by More Than 212,600% Since Its IPO

news.Title: Goldman has very good news for beaten-down Microsoft investors
news.Content: If you own Microsoft, this year has tested your patience in ways that probably feel unfair. While Nvidia and some of the other tech giants kept grabbing the AI headlines, Microsoft quietly became the worst performer in the Magnificent Seven this year, dropping about 23% in the quarter ending March 31 and badly trailing the S&P 500 That slide came even as you kept hearing that Microsoft was the best positioned AI winner, which only makes the drawdown sting more. Goldman Sachs is now stepping in to say your pain may have gone too far. Goldman has reiterated a buy ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Goldman Sachs reiterated a buy rating on Microsoft (MSFT) with a $600 price target, implying nearly 61% upside.
• Microsoft's AI story is intact, and risks are considered 'already more than priced in'.
• Microsoft's pace of multiple compression has slowed, with improving data points as AI premium tiers gain adoption.
• Goldman believes AI disintermediation risk is over-accounted for, despite Copilot lagging some competitors.
• Microsoft is described as 'the best compounder in our coverage across AI product cycles'.
news.Keywords: Microsoft stock, Goldman Sachs rating, AI upside, Copilot adoption, stock target

news.Title: If You Buy Comfort Systems USA Stock Right Now, Could It Make You a Millionaire?
news.Content: Although the S&P 500 and many stocks are down so far this year, Comfort Systems USA (NYSE: FIX) has been a notable exception. news.AI_Summary:

• The company has an 'unprecedented demand' leading to a record backlog of almost $12 billion, double since the start of the year.

• Reports of manufacturing snags were rebutted, with initial supply potentially limited for several weeks.

news.Title: As AMD AI narrative changes, here's what comes next
news.Content: AMD ’s (AMD) AI story is starting to shift. The company is no longer just a beneficiary of rising AI demand. It is now generating meaningful revenue and profit from its data-center business, giving investors a more tangible earnings base today. That changes the setup for the stock. The next phase of upside depends less on broad AI momentum and more on whether AMD can expand its role within customers and capture more system-level revenue as new products roll out. MI450 and Helios mark key inflection point AMD’s next major upside now hinges on a specific product window. Management has ...
news.AI_Summary:
• AMD's AI narrative is shifting from a potential beneficiary to generating meaningful revenue and profit from its data-center business.
• MI450 and Helios platforms are key inflection points starting in H2 2026, enabling AMD to capture more system-level revenue.
• AMD's Instinct accelerators are in production at eight of the top 10 AI companies, indicating broad adoption.
• Supply constraints are easing with an expanded Samsung HBM4 partnership, improving readiness for AI demand.
• Data Center revenue reached a record $5.4 billion in Q4 2025, creating a more tangible earnings base for the stock.
news.Keywords: AMD AI, data center business, inflection points, supply chain, earnings power

news.Title: Prediction: This Growth Stock Will Be the AI Supercycle's Biggest Winner -- and It's Not a Household Name
news.Content: There is no denying that we are in the middle of an artificial intelligence (AI) supercycle, characterized by persistently strong demand for products and/or services that typically exceeds supply. From hardware to software, companies across different AI niches are struggling to meet end-market demand. Nvidia , for instance, is looking at a whopping $1 trillion in sales ...
news.AI_Summary:
• ASML (ASML) is identified as a potential biggest winner of the AI supercycle due to its essential role in advanced chip manufacturing.
• ASML is the sole manufacturer of extreme ultraviolet (EUV) lithography machines, critical for advanced chips.
• The company received 28 billion euros worth of bookings last year, up from 19 billion euros in 2024.
• Foundry giants like TSMC and memory manufacturers like Micron are increasing capital expenditures, likely boosting ASML's orders.
• ASML's next-generation EUV tools carry a $400 million price tag, double the cost of earlier machines.
news.Keywords: ASML, AI supercycle, EUV lithography, chip manufacturing equipment, bookings growth

news.Title: Why Alibaba Stock Plummeted by Almost 13% Last Month
news.Content: Massive Chinese tech company Alibaba (NYSE: BABA) was looking rather diminished on the U.S. stock market in March. Investors weren't cheered by a report that the U.S. government might impose limits on crucial artificial intelligence (AI) technology to Chinese companies, nor were they satisfied with ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Alibaba's (BABA) stock fell nearly 13% in March due to potential U.S. limits on AI chip exports to China.
• The company's fiscal Q3 2026 results showed revenue up 2% year-over-year, but non-GAAP net income fell 67%.
• Alibaba missed analyst estimates for both revenue and net income.
• Profitability decline was attributed to aggressive spending in 'quick commerce' and AI infrastructure.
• The article suggests investors consider Alibaba's commitment to fast e-commerce and AI, or look at other tech stocks.
news.Keywords: Alibaba stock, AI chip export limits, earnings miss, quick commerce, AI infrastructure spending

news.Title: Broadcom Inks Major AI Chip Deals With Google and Anthropic
news.Content: The rise of artificial intelligence (AI) has sparked a data center boom needed to support the technology. While graphics processing units (GPUs) supported the first wave of AI adoption, power consumption has become an important consideration, prompting some operators to seek energy-saving alternatives. Broadcom (NASDAQ: AVGO) has profited from this trend, as ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Broadcom (AVGO) signed major agreements with Google and Anthropic for next-generation AI processors.
• The deals involve designing and producing Google's Tensor Processing Units (TPUs) and providing networking components.
• Anthropic will gain access to 3.5 gigawatts of TPU-based compute capacity starting in 2027.
• Broadcom's ASIC demand has surged as data center operators focus on energy savings.
• CEO Hock Tan expects AI revenue from chips to exceed $100 billion in 2027.
news.Keywords: Broadcom deals, AI chips, TPUs, data center efficiency, ASIC demand

news.Title: 3 Reasons This Warren Buffett Favorite AI Stock Could Soar Over the Next 10 Years
news.Content: Calling Apple (NASDAQ: AAPL) an artificial intelligence stock may have sounded like a stretch not long ago. But I think that view is getting outdated. Yes, Apple is not spending massive sums like Amazon , Alphabet , or Meta Platforms to build out significant AI infrastructure. news.Title: Cathie Wood Goes Bargain Hunting: 2 Stocks She Just Bought
news.Content: Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) and Kodiak AI (NASDAQ: KDK) are on the cutting edge of autonomous driving, but they have something else in common this week. They were the only two stocks that Cathie Wood's Ark Invest bought across all of its exchange-traded funds (ETFs) on Monday. Wood is a fan of futuristic trends, especially those that are rising in real time. As the co-founder, CEO, and primary stock picker at Ark Invest, she watches over an empire of aggressive growth funds. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Cathie Wood's Ark Invest has bought Tesla (TSLA) and Kodiak AI, with Tesla being its largest holding.
• Tesla's revenue declined 3% last year, marking its first top-line dip in two decades, and production of Model S and X has ceased.
• Analysts forecast Tesla's revenue to increase by 9% this year, accelerating to 17% in 2027, with anticipated stronger earnings growth.
• The company's energy generation and storage segment saw a 25% revenue increase, and its services segment exhibits double-digit growth, with future prospects in Cybercab and Optimus robots.
news.Keywords: autonomous driving, EV market, revenue growth, investment strategy, future technology

• 台灣鋼鐵產業第二季盤價有望呈現「易漲難跌」格局，點名大成鋼、中鋼等受惠標的。

• 大成鋼受惠美國當地鋁溢價走高，德州熱軋產線擴增提升自製率，法人大幅上修目標價至55元。

news.Title: Tesla dodges more headaches as autonomous driving scores a win
news.Content: Tesla scored a rare victory with the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA) on Monday after the Office of Defects and Investigations decided to close its investigation into its Actually Smart Summon tech, which allows drivers to summon their parked vehicles to them using just their phones. The ODI opened an investigation into multiple reported crashes on January 6, 2025, and, after analyzing complaint data provided by Tesla and consumer complaints, the agency concluded that, since most of the reported crashes involved minor property damage and no serious injuries, it was ending its inquiry. More Tesla Tesla loses crucial ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Tesla's 'Actually Smart Summon' feature has had its NHTSA investigation closed due to minor property damage and no serious injuries reported.
• The NHTSA analyzed consumer complaints and Tesla's data, concluding the inquiry after over a year.
• Despite this win, NHTSA is conducting an 'engineering analysis' into Tesla's Full Self-Driving (Supervised) technology.
• The investigation closure highlights the low incident rate of Smart Summon, with less than 0.1% of millions of sessions resulting in adverse events.
news.Keywords: autonomous driving, regulatory investigation, safety, software update, vehicle technology

news.Title: Retirees: Here's How to Ride Out the Artificial Intelligence (AI) Sell-Off Without Wrecking Your Portfolio
news.Content: Financial headlines feel personal when you're retired. Every time a high-flying stock drops by double digits in a single trading session or a company's management revises its earnings guidance downward, the instinct is to act -- sell, rebalance, something . But for retirees trying to protect what they've saved over decades of hard work, the most dangerous responses to market volatility are the ones rooted in emotion. The ongoing sell-off ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The article discusses strategies for retirees to navigate AI stock market volatility.
• It advises against emotional responses and suggests widening investment aperture beyond concentrated AI exposure.
• The S&P 500 is highlighted as a resilient instrument for long-term investors.
• Retirees with AI positions in the red are advised to consider lowering cost basis or trimming exposure and rotating to broader index funds.
• Holding short-duration bonds or money market funds is recommended for liquidity.
news.Keywords: retiree investing, market volatility, AI stocks, S&P 500, index funds, portfolio diversification

news.Title: Tesla's Business Has Become Much More Diversified in Just the Past Five Years. Does That Make Its Stock a Better Buy Today?
news.Content: Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) is known for its electric vehicles (EVs), and while they are still its bread and butter, the company has been evolving and diversifying its operations over the years. That can make it less susceptible to market conditions and growing competition. Here's a look at how much more diversified Tesla's business has become in recent years, and whether that could make it a better growth stock to own in the long run. Will AI create ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Tesla's business has diversified, with non-automotive revenue accounting for over 27% of its $94.8 billion total revenue in 2025.
• Automotive revenue declined by 10%, while services grew 19% and energy generation/storage increased sales by 27%.
• Despite diversification, Tesla's gross profit margin fell to 18% from 25% in 2021.
• The stock remains expensive with a P/E ratio of over 300 times earnings.
• Intensifying competition in the EV market and low margins make it difficult to justify the high valuation.
news.Keywords: business diversification, non-automotive revenue, gross margin, valuation, EV market, competition

news.Title: MSFT Deepens AI Strategy With New Foundational Models: What's Ahead?
news.Content: Microsoft MSFT is pressing deeper into proprietary artificial intelligence, with the April 2, 2026, launch of three in-house foundational models that mark a meaningful step toward building its own full-stack AI capability. The models — MAI-Transcribe-1, MAI-Voice-1 and MAI-Image-2 — are now available through Microsoft Foundry and the MAI Playground, developed by the company's MAI Superintelligence team under a philosophy the company describes as Humanist AI, ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Microsoft launched three in-house foundational AI models (MAI-Transcribe-1, MAI-Voice-1, MAI-Image-2) via Microsoft Foundry.
• MAI-Transcribe-1 offers 2.5x faster batch transcription than Azure Fast; MAI-Voice-1 generates natural speech and custom voices; MAI-Image-2 is 2x faster.
• Microsoft reported Q2 fiscal 2026 revenues of $81.3 billion (up 17% YoY) and operating income of $38.3 billion (up 21% YoY).
• Azure revenue grew 39%, and commercial backlog surged 110% to $625 billion.
• The MAI models are being deployed across Microsoft products and made available to Foundry customers.
news.Keywords: foundational AI models, Microsoft Foundry, speech-to-text, voice generation, image generation, cloud revenue, backlog

news.Content: The S&P 500 Index ($SPX) (SPY) today is down -0.63%, the Dow Jones Industrial Average ($DOWI) (DIA) is down -0.66%, and the Nasdaq 100 Index ($IUXX) (QQQ) is down -0.78%. news.Title: UPS Inks Deal to Cap Driver Buyouts: Will the Cost Burden Ease?
news.Content: United Parcel Service UPS inked a deal with the Teamsters National Negotiating Committee, placing limits on severance offers while safeguarding and prioritizing the seniority of Teamsters drivers. Teamsters General President Sean M. O’Brien played a key role in compelling UPS to return to negotiations following the filing of national grievances against it. These grievances arose after ...
news.AI_Summary:
• UPS inked a deal with the Teamsters to limit severance packages and prioritize driver seniority.
• Eligible drivers choosing early retirement will receive $150,000, with a nationwide cap of 7,500 drivers for severance payments.
• UPS will eliminate up to 30,000 operational jobs and close facilities by 2026 to reduce reliance on Amazon deliveries.
• UPS aims to adjust and right-size its network due to a planned reduction in Amazon shipment volume by over 50% by June 2026.
• UPS's competitor FedEx is also implementing cost-cutting measures and expects over $1 billion in transformation savings for fiscal 2026.
news.Keywords: severance packages, driver seniority, job cuts, network optimization, Amazon deliveries, cost-cutting

news.Title: The AI Supercycle's Biggest Blind Spot: Why Cybersecurity Growth Stocks Could Outperform in 2026
news.Content: Artificial intelligence (AI) stocks have been driving the stock market's action over the course of the three-year bull market that began in late 2022. AI stocks like Nvidia , Broadcom , Micron , and Palantir , to name a few, have put up astronomical returns. But there is one area of the tech sector that has not seen a major boost from the AI supercycle -- at least, not yet: cybersecurity. However, some notable Wall ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Cybersecurity stocks have lagged other AI stocks despite the AI supercycle, but analysts forecast a breakout in 2026.
• Global cybersecurity spending is projected to reach $240 billion in 2026 and $320 billion by 2029, with AI-related cybersecurity growing 3-4 times faster.
• JPMorgan Chase attributes increased spending to geopolitical tensions and the need to protect AI infrastructure investments.
• Cybersecurity stocks like CrowdStrike, Palo Alto Networks, and Cloudflare have seen recent gains.
• Analysts believe AI will be a major tailwind for cybersecurity as protection needs expand.
news.Keywords: cybersecurity stocks, AI supercycle, cybersecurity spending, geopolitical tensions, AI infrastructure protection, sector breakout

news.Content: April 7 (Reuters) - Intel said on Tuesday it would join Elon Musk's ‌Terafab AI chip complex project along ‌with ...
news.AI_Summary:

• The project involves building two advanced chip factories in Austin, Texas, one for cars/robots and one for AI data centers in space.
• Intel's ability to design, fabricate, and package high-performance chips at scale will accelerate Terafab's goal of producing 1 terawatt per year of compute.
• Intel shares were up about 2% in early trading and have risen around 38% year-to-date.
• The Terafab project aims to power future advances in AI and robotics.

news.Title: Billionaire Warren Buffett Says He Sold His Favorite Stock "Too Soon." Should Investors Back Up the Truck?
news.Content: Very few investors can boast the returns that Warren Buffett and his company Berkshire Hathaway have generated over six decades. That's why, when Buffett speaks, investors listen, even though the Oracle of Omaha is now 95 years old and no longer the CEO of Berkshire. In a recent interview with CNBC, Buffett said he sold one of his favorite stocks "too soon." Should investors back ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Warren Buffett stated he sold his Apple stake 'too soon' but remains happy with it as Berkshire Hathaway's largest holding (23% at end of 2025).
• Berkshire Hathaway's new CEO, Greg Abel, indicated limited activity in the Apple position moving forward.
• Buffett praised Apple CEO Tim Cook's performance.
• Apple has a lower capital expenditure ($14 billion) compared to hyperscalers ($700 billion) due to its 'AI as a commodity' bet.
• The new MacBook Neo, priced at $599, sold out quickly and could unlock a $32 billion TAM in 2026, potentially adding $0.03 to EPS.
news.Keywords: Apple stake, Berkshire Hathaway, capital expenditure, MacBook Neo, TAM, EPS, AI strategy

news.Title: Why Did Bloom Energy Stock Crash in March?
news.Content: Bloom Energy (NYSE: BE) shares have soared over 700% in the past year, with investors predicting that artificial intelligence (AI) data center growth will continue to accelerate its fuel cell business. The stock may have jumped too far, too fast, though. Some investors have begun questioning the high level ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Bloom Energy (BE) shares sank 13% in March after soaring over 700% in the past year.
• Investors are questioning the high optimism surrounding the company's fuel cell business driven by AI data center growth.
• The stock's valuation is considered high, trading at a price-to-sales ratio of about 11.5 even at the high end of revenue guidance.
• Capacity constraints may limit short-term sales, although the company claims it can expand capacity quickly.
• Short interest in Bloom Energy jumped in mid-March, representing about 10% of the public float.
news.Keywords: fuel cell business, AI data centers, stock valuation, capacity constraints, short interest, revenue guidance

Given TTD’s prominent positioning in the demand-side platform (“DSP”) space, the valuation compression raises an important question — whether this is a temporary ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The Trade Desk (TTD) is trading at a significant discount with a forward P/E of 10.29X, compared to industry peers.
• Connected TV (CTV) is a fast-growing channel for TTD, comprising about half of its business in Q4 2025.
• Retail media has emerged as another fast-growing area, with TTD building a large marketplace of retail data.
• The company's AI-powered DSP experience, Kokai, is used by nearly 100% of clients.
• International markets are growing faster than North America, representing roughly 16% of total revenues.
news.Keywords: digital ad tech, valuation discount, Connected TV, retail media, AI platform, international growth

news.Title: Should You Buy MP Materials Stock While It's Below $50?
news.Content: MP Materials (NYSE: MP) is a mining company with ambitions to become America's rare earth champion. For almost a decade, it has taken a formerly idle mine at Mountain Pass, California, and turned it into the only large-scale rare earth mining site in the United States. The final product of this mine, forged from the refined rare earth ...
news.AI_Summary:
• MP Materials aims to be America's rare earth champion, operating the only large-scale rare earth mining site in the US.
• China dominates the rare-earth metal market (69% of production), creating security risks for the US.
• The US government has a strategic $400 million partnership with MP Materials, including a guaranteed price floor for neodymium-praseodymium (NdPr).
• MP Materials is building its second magnet factory ('10X'), expected to open in 2028, increasing magnet output to 10,000 metric tons per year.
• The stock trades at a high valuation, with a nearly 1,430 times forward earnings and 37 times sales.
news.Keywords: rare earth elements, supply chain, US government partnership, magnet production, stock valuation, China dominance

After calling the fears about declining memory usage in AI infrastructure ‘overblown’, analysts at Mizuho explained that TurboQuant’s ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Mizuho Securities recommends buying memory stocks like Micron (MU) and SanDisk (SNDK), calling fears of declining memory usage in AI 'overblown'.
• Improvements in technology, such as virtual machines and fiber optics, have historically led to increased demand rather than decreased demand.
• The rapid development of AI necessitates high memory demand, making it a 'winner takes all' race where progress is prioritized over cost savings.
• SanDisk (SNDK) reported strong Q2 2026 earnings with revenue up 61% year-over-year to $3.025 billion and non-GAAP gross margin surging to 51.1%.

news.Title: 3 High-Growth AI Stocks That Actually Pay You to Wait
news.Content: When investors think of dividend stocks, they usually think of boring companies that deliver single-digit stock returns and pay a few percentage points in dividends. This provides a bit more return security, as the companies are paying out a certain amount of profits each year rather than having to deal with whatever returns the market delivers. However, there is a segment of artificial intelligence (AI) ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing (TSM) is a key player in AI, being the world's leading logic chip fabricator.
• TSMC management is bullish on AI, expecting chip revenue to have a mid- to high-50% CAGR between 2024 and 2029.
• Broadcom, a customer of TSMC, is experiencing exploding demand for its custom AI chips.
• Broadcom expects its custom AI chips to generate $100 billion in revenue by the end of 2027.
• Microsoft is seen as a safe AI investment due to its strong base business and cloud computing capabilities.

The Magnificent Seven is a group of seven cash-rich, large-cap technology stocks that have collectively dominated the US stock market and driven the majority of the S&P ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The Magnificent Seven stocks (Nvidia, Amazon, Tesla, Microsoft, Google, Apple, Meta) are hovering around fresh lows relative to the S&P 500.

• AI plays in emerging markets are showing strong momentum and are relatively more attractive than their U.S. counterparts.

news.Content: 受美伊開戰影響，外資3月大砍台股、也提款近千億元！證期局副局長黃仲豪7日指出，2026年3月單月外陸資賣超上市櫃股票新台幣8,306.08億元，創2022年以來單月 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 受美伊開戰影響，外資3月大砍台股、淨匯出31億美元（約977億元），創史上同期第4大淨匯出紀錄。
• 3月單月外陸資賣超上市櫃股票8,306.08億元，創2022年以來單月與同期第1大賣超。
• 今年1、2月外資大流入，前三月累計淨匯入177.91億美元（約5,690億元），創史上同期第1大累計淨匯入紀錄。
• 外資持股市值縮水逾8,700億元，佔比降至48.12%。
• 金管會強調，上市櫃公司獲利與營收穩健，建議投資人審慎投資、注意風險。

news.Title: Big Tech stocks suddenly look cheap
news.Content: It could be time to code a few tech stock buys into your portfolio. "The underperformance of the technology sector is also starting to generate attractive valuation opportunities for investors as its valuation, relative to expected consensus growth, has fallen below that of the global aggregate market," Goldman Sachs strategist Peter Oppenheimer wrote in a new note on Tuesday. Oppenheimer continued, "These factors ...

• Goldman Sachs notes that the technology sector's underperformance has created attractive valuation opportunities.
• Tech valuations relative to expected consensus growth have fallen below the global aggregate market.
• Hyperscalers like Microsoft and Amazon face concerns about the potential returns on their massive AI capital expenditures.
• Investors fear that AI investment costs are impacting cash flows and balance sheets.
• The Magnificent Seven group of stocks has collectively lost $1.1 trillion in market cap as of early April 2026.

news.Title: Intel to Buy Back $14.2 Billion Fab 34 Stake From Apollo
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Intel ( NASDAQ:INTC ) is moving to reassert control over a critical manufacturing asset, agreeing to acquire Apollo Global Management's ( NYSE:APO ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Intel is acquiring Apollo Global Management's 49% stake in the Fab 34 joint venture for $14.2 billion.
• Fab 34 produces semiconductors using Intel 4 and Intel 3 process technologies, central to Intel's advanced node manufacturing.
• The transaction is funded by cash on hand and approximately $6.5 billion in new debt issuances.
• Intel expects the transaction to contribute to earnings per share and support its credit profile starting in 2027.
• This move suggests Intel is placing increased strategic value on full ownership of key manufacturing capacity.
news.Keywords: Fab 34, joint venture, manufacturing asset, process technology, capital structure, earnings per share

news.Title: Why April 10 Could Be a Big Day for the Stock Market
news.Content: The market has been anything but quiet. Earlier this year, stocks struggled to overcome mounting concerns about artificial intelligence (AI) and private credit, among other signs of frothiness. Then the Iran war triggered a real sell-off, sending the major indexes briefly into correction territory. Since then, the market has bobbed and weaved, largely on headline-driven news about when the conflict could end. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue » Another potential catalyst for ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The market is sensitive to the Iran war's impact on inflation, particularly the closure of the Strait of Hormuz.
• Crude oil prices topped $100, with economists expecting the March Consumer Price Index (CPI) to surge.
• The Cleveland Fed's Inflation Nowcasting tool projects CPI to rise by 0.84% from February and 3.25% year-over-year.
• Strong March jobs data (178,000 jobs added, unemployment at 4.3%) eases recession concerns but makes Fed rate cuts less likely.
• Investors should not trade on CPI reports but watch for deviations from expectations.
news.Keywords: Iran war, inflation, CPI, oil prices, Federal Reserve, jobs report, interest rates

news.Title: Bank of America resets Apple stock forecast
news.Content: Apple ( AAPL ) stock has lost about 4.6% year to date, at the time of writing, Monday afternoon, April 6, according to Yahoo Finance . Meanwhile, the SPDR S&P 500 index ( SPY ) is down close to 3.5% in the same period. And while Apple is slightly lagging the S&P 500, so are the rest of the Magnificent 7 members. The rest of the Magnificent 7 stocks are also down in the same period: Microsoft ( MSFT ) is down almost 23%. Tesla ( TSLA ) is down 21.8%. Meta ( ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Apple's stock is down 4.6% year-to-date, slightly lagging the S&P 500 and other Magnificent 7 members.
• Apple's AI strategy involves betting AI will become a commodity, keeping capital expenditures low ($14 billion vs. hyperscalers' $700 billion).
• The new MacBook Neo, priced at $599, sold out quickly and could unlock a $32 billion TAM in 2026.
• Bank of America estimates the MacBook Neo could add $0.03 to Apple's EPS if it captures 10% market share.
• The Neo model is expected to drive adoption among first-time Mac buyers, potentially increasing services use.
news.Keywords: Apple stock, AI strategy, capital expenditure, MacBook Neo, TAM, EPS, market share

news.Title: Apple's iPhone sales continue to surge as iPhone 17 outpaces iPhone 16
news.Content: Apple’s ( AAPL ) iPhone continued strong sales last month, thanks to the popularity of the iPhone 17 line, Bernstein analysts wrote in an investor note on Monday. According to the report, Global iPhone sell-through — that is, sales of iPhones from retailers to customers — increased 26% year over year in February. Overall, the analysts say iPhone 17 unit sales are up 20% versus last year’s ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Apple's iPhone sales increased 26% year-over-year in February, driven by the iPhone 17 line.
• iPhone 17 unit sales are up 20% versus last year's iPhone 16 through September and January.
• Average Selling Price (ASP) climbed 6.9% year-over-year in February, improving each month since the iPhone 17 launch.
• China provided the biggest boost to ASP, with 20.2% year-over-year growth.
• The new MacBook Neo could provide an additional $0.03 earnings per share for 2026 if it captures 10% market share in the entry-level laptop space.
news.Keywords: iPhone sales, iPhone 17, ASP, MacBook Neo, EPS, market share, memory supply crunch

news.Title: Is This Biotech Stock Your Best Shot at Building a Millionaire-Making Position?
news.Content: Investors looking for stocks that can turn a modest portfolio into a multimillion-dollar nest egg often find what they're looking for in the biotech industry . You don't have to command billions like Wood does to see what makes CRISPR Therapeutics look like a millionaire-maker stock. It ...
news.AI_Summary:
• CRISPR Therapeutics (CRSP) has an approved therapy, Casgevy, but faces manufacturing challenges.
• Vertex Pharmaceuticals, the manufacturing partner, did not generate profit from Casgevy to share with CRISPR Therapeutics last year.
• Harvesting viable stem cells for Casgevy production has been extremely challenging.
• CRISPR Therapeutics lost $664.6 million last year, relying on new drug candidates like CTX310 for future growth.
• CTX310, an mRNA-based treatment, showed potential in lowering cholesterol and triglycerides by about half in a Phase 1 study.

news.Title: Should You Really Buy Stocks Now? Fundstrat's Tom Lee and Billionaire Bill Ackman Offer an Answer That's Crystal Clear.
news.Content: Investors have been through countless ups and downs since the start of the year: Positive tech earnings reports and talk of soaring artificial intelligence (AI) demand offered reason for optimism. But worries about AI spending climbing too high, too fast tempered the mood. Since late February, the war in Iran has weighed on investor sentiment, but any signs that the turmoil may soon be over have offered the market a boost. All ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Fundstrat's Tom Lee and Bill Ackman suggest buying stocks now, believing the market is 90-95% through the sell-off.
• The S&P 500 ended Q1 down 4.6%, influenced by AI spending concerns, high oil prices, and the Iran war.
• Nvidia (NVDA) is trading at 21x forward earnings estimates, its lowest in a year, offering value with high growth.
• Nvidia reported quarterly revenue soared 73% to $68 billion.
• Experts advise investing for the long term (at least five years) to mitigate short-term market movements.
news.Keywords: market outlook, stock buying, AI spending, oil prices, Iran war, Nvidia valuation, long-term investing

news.Title: Is the Stock Market About to Fall Sharply? Prediction Markets Flash a Warning, but Wall Street Sees Buying Opportunities.
news.Content: Recession fears have resurfaced as the Iran war has pushed oil prices to a multiyear high. In turn, investors have rotated away from stocks in favor of safer assets such as U.S. Treasuries. The S&P 500 (SNPINDEX: ^GSPC) is currently 6% below its high, and predication markets traders expect the index to fall even further in the coming months. Yet Wall Street sees buying opportunities across the technology sector, particularly ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Prediction markets show a 60% chance of the S&P 500 falling below 5,900 due to the Iran war and high oil prices.
• Despite potential downside, traders anticipate strong buying activity as the market declines.
• Wall Street analysts have raised forward earnings estimates for the technology sector, with consensus growth increasing to 45% for Q1.
• Analysts are particularly bullish on Micron (MU) and Nvidia (NVDA), with median target prices implying 50% upside.
• The discrepancy between strong earnings estimate revisions and dismal recent returns creates a buying opportunity in tech.

news.Title: Nvidia, Apple, Alphabet, Amazon, and Microsoft Are Sending Shockwaves Through Wall Street With This $16 Billion Warning
news.Content: For much of the last 17 years, the bulls have been in firm control on Wall Street. However, it's the stock market's largest and most influential companies that are responsible for most of the heavy lifting . I'm talking about the $2 trillion-and-up club, consisting of Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) , Apple (NASDAQ: AAPL) , Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOGL) (NASDAQ: GOOG) , Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT) , and Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) . Since the benchmark S&P 500 (SNPINDEX: ^GSPC) hit its financial crisis low on March 9, 2009, it's rallied 873%, through the closing ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The 'Magnificent Seven' companies (Nvidia, Apple, Alphabet, Microsoft, Amazon) have shown significant outperformance since March 2009.
• These companies possess sustainable competitive advantages: Nvidia's GPUs in AI, Apple's iPhone dominance, Google's search monopoly, Microsoft's Windows/Azure, and Amazon's e-commerce/AWS leadership.
• These businesses are leveraging the AI revolution, with Nvidia dominating hardware and others seeing reaccelerating cloud sales.
• Insiders at these five companies have net-sold nearly $16.1 billion in stock over the trailing two years.
• This insider selling trend is a $16 billion warning that investors should not ignore.
news.Keywords: Magnificent Seven, competitive advantages, AI revolution, insider selling, stock performance, market leadership

news.Title: 台新證併元富證 吳東亮：台股全球第七 券商整併最佳時候
news.Content:
台新新光金控子公司台新證券及元富證券、台新期貨及元富期貨已正式合併，台新金董事長吳東亮表示，台股已是全球第七大的資本市場「非常不容易」 ，是證券公司合併最好的時機。

台新金控董事長吳東亮表示，台灣經濟近年快 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台新證券及元富證券、台新期貨及元富期貨已正式合併，台新金董事長吳東亮表示，台股已是全球第七大資本市場。
• 台灣經濟近年快速成長，資本市場表現亮眼，台股躍升為全球第七大資本市場，是證券業整併的好時機。
• 台新證券與元富證券各有強項、具互補性，在投資銀行承銷與數位金融發展突出。
• 合併後將擁有全台79個營業據點，服務範圍更廣，未來將持續深化服務，提升投資人體驗。
• 台新證券將透過專業顧問團隊布局海外市場，並引進國際資金與人才回流台灣。

news.Title: 《台股盤後》量縮收漲657點，收復月線
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-04-07 15:51:47 新聞中心 發佈

美股週一全面上揚，台股今(7)日開高走高，且在記憶股如南亞科/威剛走高、IC載板南電漲停 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美股週一全面上揚，台股7日開高走高，在記憶股如南亞科/威剛走高、IC載板南電漲停/欣興漲近9%、AI設備股鴻勁漲4.6%/致茂漲2.3%、LEO概念股昇達科漲停下，市場人氣漸回籠。
• 權王台積電全場強勢，加權指數終場收在33229.82點、上漲657.39點或2.02%、收復月線，成交量縮至5643.42億元。
• 美伊停火協議似有進展，加上美股投資人漸忽略戰事變數因子，輔以美光等記憶股回神漲逾3%，激勵市場信心。
• 電子權值股與AI供應鏈股多有反彈，台積電收在1860元，上漲2.76%，聯電大漲逾8%，台達電也有近6%漲幅。
• 三大法人今日總計買超195.59億元，外資買超100.75億元，投信買超24.51億元，自營商買超70.32億元。

news.AI_Summary:

• 市場觀望氣氛濃厚，成交值量縮至5643.42億元。

news.Title: 亞股淪外資提款機？台股上周慘遭賣超50億美元 韓、印股未倖免
news.Content: 受美伊兩國展現停火意願激勵，全球股債資產在過去一週同步展開反彈 。儘管雙方言辭交鋒依然激烈，市場仍對中東局勢趨緩抱持正面解讀，帶動資金大舉回流 。根據統計，過去一週全球股票型 ETF ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 受美伊兩國展現停火意願激勵，全球股債資產同步反彈，資金大舉回流。
• 過去一週全球股票型ETF獲淨流入148.1億美元，美國市場吸金力最強。
• 亞洲、中國及歐洲市場持續面臨資金淨流出壓力，台股遭外資淨賣超高達50億美元。
• 南韓與印度股市也未能倖免，分別出現39億美元與31億美元賣壓。
• 富蘭克林證券投顧分析，儘管中東戰事與通膨走勢仍有不確定性，但隨多項關鍵經濟數據公布，企業基本面將重新主導盤面方向。

news.Title: 【公告】智原 2026年3月合併營收10.67億元 年增-69.38%
news.AI_Summary:
• ASIC設計服務廠智原3月合併營收10.66億元，年減69.38%，累計第一季合併營收25.89億元，年減65.2%。
• 公司說明，營收下滑主因為量產專案減少，去年同期基期較高，加上客戶產品進入世代交替期，導致短期出貨動能轉弱。
• 法人指出，ASIC產業營運高度仰賴專案進度，從前期NRE到後段量產階段，營收貢獻差異顯著。
• 智原近期表現為典型案例，營收可能出現明顯修正。
• 隨美系雲端服務供應商（CSP）積極發展自研ASIC，帶動ASIC設計服務需求持續擴大。
news.Keywords: 智原,ASIC,營收,年減,量產專案,NRE,CSP,AI

news.Title: 國泰投信：地緣政治雜音不改長多 台積電法說將成台股「定海神針」
news.Content: 關稅風暴後時隔一年，中東戰爭的煙硝又讓全球市場陷入詭譎多變的局面，國際油價更在通膨疑慮下突破百元大關。國泰投信指出，從 2025 年的歷史經驗來看，地緣政治的訊號對股市的衝擊大多是短暫且劇烈，卻也常是中長期布局的良機 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 國泰投信認為，地緣政治雜音不改台股長多格局，企業獲利動能是市場焦點。
• 下週台積電法說會展望是重中之重，先進封裝供不應求與AI需求擴張支撐台股震盪向上。
• 儘管美伊衝突導致油價攀升，但市場對戰事干擾已具心理免疫力。
• 4月法說會旺季將至，市場目光轉向科技產業訂單與展望，PCB、記憶體與電力族群是焦點。
• 預期台積電法說會釋出先進封裝產能及AI晶片需求正向訊號，有望帶動台股反彈。
news.Keywords: 台股,地緣政治,台積電法說會,AI,先進封裝

news.Title: One Wall Street Analyst Sees Tesla Crashing 60%. Are They Right?
news.Content: With a market cap of $1.3 trillion and cutting-edge technology, Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) has earned its membership in the vaunted "Magnificent Seven" group of top tech stocks, but there's an important difference between Tesla and the rest of the Magnificent Seven . The six other tech giants trade at valuations that are within range of the S&P 500 . In fact, you can make an argument that any of them are undervalued based on their growth rates and competitive advantages compared to the broad-market index. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the ...
news.AI_Summary:
• JPMorgan analyst Ryan Brinkman issued a bearish note on Tesla, predicting a 60% stock price decline to $145.
• Tesla's core EV business declined by volume in 2024 and 2025, with revenue slightly below 2023 levels.
• Operating income fell by half due to plunging margins amid increased EV competition.
• The stock's high valuation is not supported by current financial results, despite Elon Musk's vision for robotaxis and robots.
news.Keywords: bearish outlook, stock price target, EV business decline, operating income, valuation concerns

news.Title: Elon Musk makes a stunning claim about Tesla's chip future
news.Content: On a Saturday night in Austin, standing inside a defunct power plant, Elon Musk delivered a message that cut straight to the heart of the AI chip shortage: His companies cannot get the chips they need, so they are going to build their own. Musk shared on March 21 that Tesla, SpaceX , and xAI are launching a joint venture called Terafab, a semiconductor fabrication facility to be built adjacent to Tesla's Giga Texas campus in Austin. The project is estimated to cost between $20 billion ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Elon Musk announced a joint venture, Terafab, to build a semiconductor fabrication facility costing $20-$25 billion.
• The facility aims to produce chips for Tesla's FSD, Optimus robots, and SpaceX's space-based data centers.
• It targets 2-nanometer process technology with an initial output of 100,000 wafer starts per month.
• Industry analysts expressed skepticism due to Musk's lack of semiconductor manufacturing background and the project's immense scale.
news.Keywords: semiconductor fabrication, Terafab, AI chips, SpaceX, Tesla

news.Title: Samsung Beats High Estimates After AI Chip Sales Defy War Fears
news.Content: (Bloomberg) -- Samsung Electronics Co. earned a far stronger-than-expected eight-fold leap in quarterly profit, underscoring robust demand for AI memory chips in the face of markets roiled by war in the Middle East. Customers led by cloud service providers are ramping up orders for high-bandwidth memory and other chips used in data centers to feed artificial intelligence services, lifting ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Samsung Electronics reported a record preliminary operating profit of 57.2 trillion won ($37.9 billion) for Q1, an eight-fold leap.
• Revenue climbed to 133 trillion won, exceeding analyst expectations.
• Robust demand for AI memory chips, particularly High Bandwidth Memory (HBM), drove the strong results.
• Samsung dominates global memory supply with SK Hynix and Micron, shifting production towards HBM for AI accelerators.
news.Keywords: AI chips, memory market, HBM, quarterly profit, revenue growth

news.Title: 4/7「台股重挫一週年」 ！ 謝金河嘆：每年這時都有大事
news.Content: 去年的清明連假，川普以對等關稅撼動全球市場，台股寫下單日崩跌逾二千點的慘烈紀錄，台積電更一度殺破八百元大關。當時謝金河挺身喊話，將那場風暴定義為「人造熊市」中的絕佳買點。如今一年過去，世界焦點轉向伊朗，川普再次發揮其影響 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 回顧去年清明連假，川普的對等關稅政策引發全球股市崩盤，台股單日重挫逾2000點。
• 當時謝金河將此風暴定義為「人造熊市」中的絕佳買點，台積電當時跌破800元。
• 今年世界焦點轉向伊朗，川普再次發揮影響力，市場屏息以待。
• 謝金河認為，川普不斷對伊朗叫板，全球股市緊盯油價波動，此次將是另一場驚嚇或驚喜有待觀察。
• 去年台股在連假期間府院高度關切，謝金河建議無需護盤。
news.Keywords: 台股,川普,關稅政策,地緣政治,市場展望

news.Content: 小編今天（7）日精選5件國內外重要財經大事。美伊戰爭持續干擾全球金融市場，美國總統川普喊話最快6日與伊朗達成協議，也警告若伊朗不簽署協議或重新開放荷姆茲海峽 ...

news.Title: Samsung Profit Up Eight-Fold as AI Chip Sales Defy War Fears
news.Content: (Bloomberg) -- Samsung Electronics Co. earned a far stronger-than-expected eight-fold leap in quarterly profit, underscoring robust demand for AI memory chips in the face of uncertainties triggered by war in the Middle East. Customers led by cloud service providers are ramping up orders for high-bandwidth memory and other chips used in ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Samsung Electronics reported a record preliminary operating profit of 57.2 trillion won ($37.9 billion) for Q1, an eight-fold leap.
• Revenue climbed to 133 trillion won, exceeding analyst expectations.
• Robust demand for AI memory chips, particularly High Bandwidth Memory (HBM), drove the strong results.
• Samsung dominates global memory supply with SK Hynix and Micron, shifting production towards HBM for AI accelerators.
news.Keywords: AI chips, memory market, HBM, quarterly profit, revenue growth

news.Title: Which Artificial Intelligence (AI) Supercycle Stock Will Make You Richer Over the Next 10 Years?
news.Content: The artificial intelligence (AI) supercycle is creating huge opportunities across chips and data center infrastructure. And at a glance, both Advanced Micro Devices (NASDAQ: AMD) and Intel (NASDAQ: INTC) look like reasonable ways to invest in that trend. Both have products tied to AI data centers, and both are trying to win a bigger slice of the next wave of computing demand. But when comparing the two, I think one of these two chip companies is a ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) reported strong Q4 2025 results with revenue up 34% year-over-year to $10.3 billion, driven by a 39% increase in data center revenue to $5.4 billion.
• For the full year 2025, AMD's revenue grew 34% to $34.6 billion, with data center revenue up 32% to $16.6 billion.
• The company anticipates Q1 2026 revenue to be around $9.8 billion, representing approximately 32% year-over-year growth.
• Intel's Q4 2025 revenue declined 4% year-over-year to $13.7 billion, and its data center and AI segment grew 9%.
news.Keywords: AI, semiconductor, data center, revenue growth, market share, earnings

news.Title: 連假後台股剉咧等？專家揭2資產「豬羊變色」：世界走到了轉折時刻
news.Content:
財經中心／林昀萱報導

美國和以色列在2月底對伊朗展開軍事行動，中東戰火蔓延至今，世界各國股市都慘遭波及，今（7）日是台股清明連假後開盤首日，走勢也 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 財經專家阮慕驊指出，中東戰爭正在改變全球經濟和金融結構，大宗物資表現強勁，比特幣表現疲弱。
• 過去數年大宗物資表現通常最差，比特幣則是當紅炸子雞，今年情況出現「豬羊變色」。
• 專家認為這是「脫虛入實」趨勢，實物資產（油、天然氣、糧食）價值被重新認識。
• 未來世界的秩序和格局正在重塑，「世界走到了轉折時刻」。
• 投資人應以不同視角看待資產配置。
news.Keywords: 中東戰爭,大宗物資,比特幣,經濟結構,資產配置

news.Title: 《美股》盼美伊趕在期限前停火 美光嗨激勵費半
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-04-07 07:07:50 郭妍希 發佈

美伊停火協議似有進展，加上美國總統川普(Donald Trump)威脅若伊朗未能重啟荷姆茲海峽、雙方戰事將大幅升溫，美國四大指數震盪走揚。

道瓊工業平均指數4月 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美伊停火協議似有進展，加上川普威脅若伊朗未能重啟荷姆茲海峽，美股四大指數震盪走揚。
• 費城半導體指數上漲1.06%，美光勁揚3.51%，受惠於AI伺服器對記憶體需求大增。
• 市場預期美伊可能達成某種形式的和解，但短期內難以立即停火。
• 油價震盪走高，西德州原油期貨收盤價為每桶112.41美元。

news.Keywords: 美伊停火,費城半導體,美光,AI伺服器,油價

news.Content:
財經中心／余國棟報導

美國股市周一（6）日延續反彈氣勢，四大指數全面收紅，其中那斯達克指數上漲117點（+0.54%）、標普500指數上漲0.44%，費城半導體指數更強勢上漲1.06%，顯示科技股與半導體族群重新獲得資金青睞。美股四大指 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美股周一延續反彈氣勢，四大指數全面收紅，費城半導體指數強勢上漲1.06%，科技股獲資金青睞。
• 市場情緒回穩主因對美伊停火談判抱持期待，但地緣政治風險仍未解除，油價維持高檔。
• 美國最新數據呈現分歧，服務業擴張放緩，但就業市場仍具韌性，通膨指標升至近兩年高點。
• 台股期貨與籌碼面顯示短線有機會技術性反彈，但外資仍偏保守。
• 台股短線處於「利多與風險交錯」關鍵時刻，操作宜採取保守中帶彈性策略。

news.Title: 1 Brilliant Growth Stock to Buy Before It Joins Nvidia in the $4 Trillion Club
news.Content: While the number can change from day to day, there are currently 12 companies with a market cap of $1 trillion or more, but only one is a member of the prestigious $4 trillion club: Nvidia . The company supplies the graphics processing units (GPUs) that kick-started the artificial intelligence (AI) revolution, but some investors are looking ahead to see what comes next. The stock market has pulled back thanks to geopolitical uncertainty, and some are wary of big tech's spending plans, but I remain convinced that Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) is poised to join Nvidia in this prestigious club in ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Amazon is presented as a growth stock poised to potentially reach a $4 trillion market capitalization, joining Nvidia.
• In Q4, Amazon's revenue grew 14% year-over-year, with AWS revenue up 24% and digital advertising up 23%.
• The company plans a significant $200 billion capex investment over the next year, citing strong AWS demand.
• Amazon's market cap is approximately $2.3 trillion, requiring substantial growth to reach the $4 trillion target.
news.Keywords: growth stock, market cap, AWS, cloud infrastructure, capital expenditure, AI

news.Title: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Unite to Combat Model Copying in China
news.Content: (Bloomberg) -- Rivals OpenAI, Anthropic PBC, and Alphabet Inc.’s Google have begun working together to try to clamp down on Chinese competitors extracting results from cutting-edge US artificial intelligence models to gain an edge in the global AI race. The firms are sharing information through the Frontier Model Forum, an industry nonprofit that the three tech companies founded with Microsoft Corp. in 2023, to detect so-called adversarial distillation attempts that violate their terms of service, according to people familiar with the matter. The rare collaboration underscores the severity ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Rivals OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google are collaborating through the Frontier Model Forum to combat adversarial distillation by Chinese competitors.
• This collaboration aims to detect and prevent unauthorized replication of US AI models, which costs Silicon Valley billions annually.
• OpenAI accused Chinese firm DeepSeek of attempting to 'free-ride' on its capabilities.
• Distillation is a technique where an older AI model trains a newer one, often at lower cost.
• US AI labs warn that foreign adversaries could use distillation to develop AI models stripped of safety guardrails.
news.Keywords: AI model protection, adversarial distillation, Frontier Model Forum, OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, China competition, safety guardrails

news.Title: Google Researchers Unveil 20x Lower Quantum Resources Needed to Break Crypto
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Google ( NASDAQ:GOOG ) researchers are signaling a potentially meaningful shift in how investors should think about long-term crypto security, warning that advances in quantum computing could reduce the ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Google Quantum AI researchers estimate quantum computing could require 20x fewer resources to break cryptography.
• New quantum circuits suggest attacks on elliptic curve cryptography could be executed in minutes with fewer than 500,000 physical qubits.
• While not an immediate threat, this could accelerate the timeline for blockchain security challenges.
• Google plans to migrate all its security systems to post-quantum cryptography by 2029 and encourages industry migration.
news.Keywords: quantum computing, cryptography, blockchain security, post-quantum cryptography, timeline acceleration, cybersecurity
